tech_adaptive_bureaucracy.name: Adaptive Bureaucracy
tech_adaptive_bureaucracy.description: The progress we make calls for a new, nimbler form of administration that may aid rather than hinder us in our pursuits.

tech_adaptive_combat_algorithms.name: Adaptive Combat Algorithms
tech_adaptive_combat_algorithms.description: Organics often fight using illogical and unpredictable tactics that can be difficult to effectively counter. Adaptive tactics and new, more maneuverable warforms should provide a decisive advantage.

tech_advanced_industrial_storm_protectio.name: Planetary Storm Nullification
tech_advanced_industrial_storm_protectio.description: By consolidating local weather control systems, planetary weather patterns can be manipulated to significantly reduce most of the cosmic storms' harmful effects on production.

tech_advanced_metallurgy_1.name: Ceramo-Metal Alloys
tech_advanced_metallurgy_1.description: The widespread use of advanced ceramics in industry can improve metallurgical yields.

tech_advanced_metallurgy_2.name: Durasteel-Laced Alloys
tech_advanced_metallurgy_2.description: By replacing antiquated ceramo-metal equipment with cutting edge technology, we can run our forges hotter and longer, increasing production.

tech_advanced_storm_manipulation.name: Advanced Storm Manipulation
tech_advanced_storm_manipulation.description: Continued study into astrometeorology grants us the power to more precisely bend and manipulate Cosmic Storms to our own needs.

tech_afterburners_1.name: Afterburners
tech_afterburners_1.description: These powerful thrusters provide additional combat speed but consume a great deal of power.

tech_afterburners_2.name: Advanced Afterburners
tech_afterburners_2.description: This improved version of the standard afterburners provide an even greater boost to a ship's combat speed.

grants:
Future Glimpse: Omega Theory — Future Glimpse
An inkling of coming perspectives and past affections.

Half of a whole, useless on its own; when complete may allow our scientists to stumble upon the Omega Theory technology.

tech_akx_worm_1.name: Entropic Recursion
tech_akx_worm_1.description: The universe tends irresistibly onwards and downwards. That tendency cannot be reversed... but it can be subverted, for a price.

source.name: The Horizon Signal: A Lesson in the Ashes

grants:
Future Glimpse: Omega Theory — Future Glimpse
An inkling of coming perspectives and past affections.

Half of a whole, useless on its own; when complete may allow our scientists to stumble upon the Omega Theory technology.

tech_akx_worm_2.name: Doctrine: Strange Loop
tech_akx_worm_2.description: A set of social protocols based on paradoxical intuition, and on love. When we know the System of the Loop, we learn that we can influence by receiving instructions, as well as giving them.

tech_akx_worm_3.name: Omega Theory
tech_akx_worm_3.description: When a temporal paradox becomes tangled, a kind of consciousness arises, with its own needs, its own desires. This is what has occurred with the consciousness that some call the Worm-in-Waiting. If we can align ourselves with that consciousness, we might just achieve a kind of immortality.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Corvette-Scale Space Fauna Cloning

tech_alien_cloning.name: Artificial Breeding
tech_alien_cloning.description: In a carefully controlled environment, we can incubate the Genetic Material collected from culled Space Fauna and produce new members of each species under our command.

tech_alien_life_studies.name: Xenology
tech_alien_life_studies.description: Studying the fauna of other worlds gives insight into alien behaviors, allowing us to identify and domesticate docile entities.

tech_alien_topography.name: Alien Topography
tech_alien_topography.description: Civilizations flourish in locations that promotes growth, and by analyzing where the majority of pre-FTL settlements thrive we can gain more out of our colonies.

tech_alloy_fossilization.name: Alloy Fossilization
tech_alloy_fossilization.description: By exposing biological material to simulated chthonian-level radiation, we can fossilize cellular structures into usable metallic alloys.

tech_alloys_1.name: Holographic Casts
tech_alloys_1.description: Solid holographic casts can alter their shapes at a moment's notice, speeding up alloy production.

tech_alloys_2.name: Nano-Separators
tech_alloys_2.description: Nano-separators are a revolutionary new step in the creation of alloys, simplifying the casting process while improving overall production quality.

tech_amoeba_strike_craft_1.name: Flagella Weaponization
tech_amoeba_strike_craft_1.description: By altering the breeding process of Space Amoebas, we can program their symbiotic flagella to act as organic strike craft for our navy.

grants: Unlocks Component: Antimatter Reactor — Antimatter Reactor\nBy harnessing the energy produced by matter/antimatter annihilations, our efficiency at generating ship power will be orders of magnitude better than fusion.

tech_antimatter_power.name: Antimatter Power
tech_antimatter_power.description: By harnessing the energy produced by matter/antimatter annihilations, our efficiency at generating ship power will be orders of magnitude better than fusion.

tech_arc_emitter_1.name: Arc Emitters
tech_arc_emitter_1.description: Powerful weapons that launch a lightning arc of chaotic energy at targets, which in part can ignore armor and shields.

tech_arc_emitter_2.name: Focused Arc Emitters
tech_arc_emitter_2.description: These upgraded emitters are equipped with better focusing lenses, resulting in a more powerful energy discharge.

tech_arcane_deciphering.name: Arcane Deciphering
tech_arcane_deciphering.description: Various artifacts and technologies functioning by arcane means that cannot be understood or replicated... at least not by conventional science as it is known to us.

grants: Unlocks Component: Ancient Target Scrambler — Ping repeaters and optic diffusers with the right wavelengths can produce destructive interference and effectively scramble hostile targeting systems.

tech_archaeo_detection_scrambler.name: Ancient Target Scrambler
tech_archaeo_detection_scrambler.description: Ping repeaters and optic diffusers with the right wavelengths can produce destructive interference and effectively scramble hostile targeting systems.

tech_archaeo_lasers.name: Ancient Cavitation Collapser
tech_archaeo_lasers.description: This high energy weapon causes brutal micro collapsing events on impact, generating tremendous heat and force inside its targets armor.

tech_archaeo_mass_accelerator.name: Ancient Saturator Artillery
tech_archaeo_mass_accelerator.description: This cannon fires a barrage of ancient miniscule ionized spheres that charge upon contact with most force fields, giving them high levels of shield penetration. Any theory that these spheres could have been used for jewelry purposes were dismissed when a critical incident melted an entire laboratory.

tech_archaeo_mass_drivers.name: Ancient Macro Batteries
tech_archaeo_mass_drivers.description: These cannons of gargantuan size deliver relatively slow but devastating projectiles, and can fire pretty much anything, from scrap metal, to asteroid chunks.

tech_archaeo_missiles.name: Ancient Nano-Missile Cloud Launcher
tech_archaeo_missiles.description: Particle charges, once stabilized thanks to ancient technology, allow us to create swarms of tiny missiles that still carry a respectable payload, and should be able to overwhelm most point-defense systems.

tech_archaeo_overcharger.name: Ancient Shield Overcharger
tech_archaeo_overcharger.description: Supercharging shields can be done safely thanks to ancient stabilizer coils and dampeners. In addition to the production of a stronger force field, this also has the added benefit of outright vaporizing certain incoming projectiles.

tech_archaeo_pk_devolving_beam.name: Devolving Beam
tech_archaeo_pk_devolving_beam.description: A colossal mind-wiping cannon which unleashes a planet-wide wave of energy, returning most sentient life to a pre-sapient state. We estimate that with additional tuning, it might also be used to wipe clean memory banks and disable robotic units.

tech_archaeo_point_defence.name: Ancient Defensive Web Slinger
tech_archaeo_point_defence.description: When it comes to tracking and shooting down missiles, these antique batteries are the best of the best, making use of a predictive algorithm written in long forgotten code to weave a fiery defensive web.

tech_archaeo_rampart.name: Ancient Rampart
tech_archaeo_rampart.description: Defense platforms are a cost effective way to ensure our safety, but they need to be monitored from an operation center. Fortifying our Starbase to ensure its survivability in the event of an attack, and maximizing our capacity to network independent orbital defenses would give us more time to dispatch reinforcements.

tech_archaeo_refinery.name: Ancient Refinery
tech_archaeo_refinery.description: This millennia-old processing equipment has an efficiency rate above 100%. Its functioning remains alien, but its production gains are substantial.

tech_archaeo_strike_crafts.name: Ancient Driller Drones
tech_archaeo_strike_crafts.description: These high velocity drones have been equipped with antique mining lasers that virtually ignore any plating protecting their target. A tech too good to be wasted on astro mining.

tech_archaeo_titan_beam.name: Ancient Ruination Glare
tech_archaeo_titan_beam.description: Tremendous medium range firepower will enable our titans to break through enemy lines. These ancient cannons were once the foundation upon which a galactic empire was built.

tech_archaeoarmor.name: Ancient Pulse Armor
tech_archaeoarmor.description: Ionized plates of armor can carry a reactive charge to alleviate the energy of impacts, using magnetic repulsion and field projection principles.

tech_archaeoshield.name: Ancient Suspension Field
tech_archaeoshield.description: Projected farther than regular shields, the suspension field technology uses ancient artifacts to slow time at the point of impact to afford the shields a longer opportunity to dispel the incoming attack's energy.

tech_archaeostudies.name: Archaeostudies
tech_archaeostudies.description: This new field of studies focuses on the practical applications of ancient artifacts. We are far from being the first galactic civilization to tread these stars. With a bit of work, their legacies could secure our future.

grants: Unlocks Component: Curator Archaeology Lab — A shipboard lab with advanced archaeological equipment, including a vast database supplied by the Curator Order where new discoveries can easily be cross-referenced.

tech_archeology_lab.name: Curator Archaeology Lab
tech_archeology_lab.description: A shipboard lab with advanced archaeological equipment, including a vast database supplied by the Curator Order where new discoveries can easily be cross-referenced.

grants: Unlocks Component: Curator Archaeology Lab — A shipboard lab with advanced archaeological equipment, including a vast database supplied by the Curator Order where new discoveries can easily be cross-referenced.

tech_archeology_lab_ancrel.name: Curator Archaeology Lab
tech_archeology_lab_ancrel.description: A shipboard lab with advanced archaeological equipment, including a vast database supplied by the Curator Order where new discoveries can easily be cross-referenced.

grants:
Unlocks Feature: Arkship Construction — Arkship Construction
Allows our Arkships to construct additional Arkships using the Megastructure Build Menu.

Our society need not be limited to one home. With the ability to construct additional Arkships, every direction becomes a path, and every path becomes ours.

tech_arkship_construction.name: Arkship Construction
tech_arkship_construction.description: Our society need not be limited to one home. With the ability to construct additional Arkships, every direction becomes a path, and every path becomes ours.

tech_arkship_exodus_jump.name: Exodus Jump Coordinator
tech_arkship_exodus_jump.description: The Exodus Coordinator is still largely a prototype that will one day enable us to cross to different galaxies in the blink of an eye.

tech_arkship_planetary_refinery.name: Planetary Reprocessor
tech_arkship_planetary_refinery.description: Smaller celestial bodies can be crushed and processed in these enormous gears, providing us with a bounty of materials.

grants: Unlocks Contract Type: Stellar Ignition — Stellar Ignition contracts let us transform gas giants into newborn stars, unlocking vast energy and research resources for the system.

tech_arkship_stellar_igniter.name: Stellar Engine
tech_arkship_stellar_igniter.description: A dark matter injection system capable of triggering stellar-scale fusion events. It has no safe setting.

grants: Unlocks Contract Type: Deep Scan — Deep Scan contracts let us uncover further discoveries in a system.

tech_arkship_system_scanner.name: Subspace Imaging Array
tech_arkship_system_scanner.description: The void speaks, and for those who know to listen, it whispers the secrets of the countless worlds in its embrace.

grants: Unlocks Arkship Upgrade: Arkship Engineering — Arkship Engineering\nRefined structural design and improved drive systems allow for a new generation of Arkships: carrying more of who we are, further than we have ever gone.

tech_arkship_tier_2.name: Arkship Engineering
tech_arkship_tier_2.description: Refined structural design and improved drive systems allow for a new generation of Arkships: carrying more of who we are, further than we have ever gone.

grants: Unlocks Arkship Upgrade: Arkship Mastery — Arkship Mastery\nThe pinnacle of mobile megastructure engineering. These Arkships represent the full extent of what a traveling civilization can achieve.

tech_arkship_tier_3.name: Arkship Mastery
tech_arkship_tier_3.description: The pinnacle of mobile megastructure engineering. These Arkships represent the full extent of what a traveling civilization can achieve.

tech_armor_hardeners_1.name: Armor Hardening
tech_armor_hardeners_1.description: Incorporating a crystal lattice in our ship's defenses provides some resistance to weapons that normally cut through armor.

tech_armor_hardeners_2.name: Adaptive Armor Hardening
tech_armor_hardeners_2.description: Threads of living metal react to incoming fire, rearranging itself to better resist penetrating weapons fire.

tech_artificial_moral_codes.name: Artificial Moral Codes
tech_artificial_moral_codes.description: It is circumstance that dictates what is moral. Define the circumstances, and ethics is like clay in your hands.

tech_ascension_theory.name: Ascension Theory
tech_ascension_theory.description: Our history is a repeating cycle of dramatic technological, political, and cultural leaps; these leaps are often preceded by periods of upheaval and followed by times of relative stability. By identifying the core, recurring premises of these leaps, we may be able to effectively short-circuit the cycle for our own benefit.

tech_assault_armies.name: Interplanetary Expeditionary Forces
tech_assault_armies.description: The invasion of another world is a staggering enterprise. There are immense logistical challenges that must be overcome before we can muster our first interplanetary armies.

tech_assembly_pattern.name: Assembly Patterns
tech_assembly_pattern.description: Rapid iteration in construction simulations determines the optimal component assembly patterns for each building project ahead of time.

tech_assisted_detection.name: Advanced Detection Algorithms
tech_assisted_detection.description: Coupling detection arrays with the computers onboard our science vessels can vastly increase their scanning resolution.

tech_asteroidal_carapace.name: Asteroidal Carapace
tech_asteroidal_carapace.description: The shell of a Cutholoid is not mineral alone, but reinforced with strong biological fibers. We can synthesize this process using advanced metallurgic techniques.

tech_astral_harvesting.name: Astral Harvesting
tech_astral_harvesting.description: The harvesting of torn astral fabric along the scars of rifts in space and time is made possible with delicate modifications to our research stations.

tech_atmospheric_orbital_mechanics.name: Atmospheric Orbital Mechanics
tech_atmospheric_orbital_mechanics.description: Due to our vast experience operating observation stations in orbit of pre-FTL worlds, we have discovered slight optimizations. By implementing them empire-wide, we can drastically reduce the maintenance our stations require.

tech_aura_intensification.name: Psionic Aura Intensification
tech_aura_intensification.description: Psionic emanations from the Shroud long to expand. With this new understanding, an empire's Psionic Auras can increase in intensity and spread throughout star systems, bringing benefits to allies and disadvantages to foes.

tech_aura_resonation.name: Aura Resonation
tech_aura_resonation.description: There is a way to project Psionic Auras beyond populated worlds. With the addition of an Psionic Projector, even a starbase can become a conduit for psionic emanations from the Shroud.

tech_autocannons_1.name: Autocannons
tech_autocannons_1.description: Large-caliber ballistic weapons that fire cased explosive shells. The main advantage of these cannons is their high rate of fire.

tech_autocannons_2.name: Ripper Cannons
tech_autocannons_2.description: These upgraded rotary autocannons feature improved tracking and fire control systems. This allows them to maintain an even higher rate of fire.

tech_autocannons_3.name: Stormfire Cannons
tech_autocannons_3.description: Advanced rotary autocannons capable of spewing a cloud of high-explosive shells at a target.

tech_autocurating_vault.name: Automated Curation Algorithms
tech_autocurating_vault.description: Continuous, asynchronous analysis of disparate data sets allows for the accurate modeling of hitherto-unpredictable fluctuations in social currents.

tech_automated_exploration.name: Automated Exploration Protocols
tech_automated_exploration.description: An advanced AI will aid science officers in their task to explore strange new worlds, to seek out new life and new civilizations, to boldly go where no Blorg has gone before. The Science Ship will be able to explore the galaxy with help from an AI.

tech_autonomous_agents.name: Autonomous Agents
tech_autonomous_agents.description: Semi-independent units have proved critical to the success of the greater whole.

tech_auxiliary_fire_control.name: Auxiliary Fire-control
tech_auxiliary_fire_control.description: By installing an auxiliary fire-control system our ships can afford to make more advanced calculations, increasing accuracy.

tech_basic_health.name: Medical Care
tech_basic_health.description: A micro-unit of prevention is worth a macro-unit of cure. Sometimes, however, both are needed.

tech_basic_industry.name: Industrial Base
tech_basic_industry.description: The basic industrial infrastructure that is required to become a spacefaring civilization.

tech_basic_science_lab_2.name: Exotic Materials Labs
tech_basic_science_lab_2.description: As we explore the galaxy, we continually encounter new materials and substances that are unfamiliar to us. Cataloging and analyzing these discoveries will require new facilities.

tech_basic_science_lab_3.name: Multi-Dimensional Studies
tech_basic_science_lab_3.description: To expand our knowledge base, we must consider all levels of existence. A new realm of science awaits us!

tech_battleship_build_speed.name: Standardized Battleship Patterns
tech_battleship_build_speed.description: Establishing new standards for how we design and construct massive battleships greatly improves the speed at which they can be assembled.

tech_battleship_hull_1.name: Improved Battleship Hulls
tech_battleship_hull_1.description: Advances in building techniques will allow for the construction of sturdier and more durable battleships.

tech_battleship_hull_2.name: Advanced Battleship Hulls
tech_battleship_hull_2.description: The latest generation of battleship hulls have optimized structural integrity fields and improved bulkheads.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Battleship — Battleship\nThe largest regular hull configuration available, the Battleship carries immense power into battle at even greater cost and reduced maneuverability.

tech_battleships.name: Battleships
tech_battleships.description: The largest of the standard military vessels, Battleships are traditionally heavily armored and sport several gun batteries.

tech_binary_motivators.name: Binary Motivators
tech_binary_motivators.description: These advanced motivators are both smaller and lighter than previous versions, allowing robotic units to allocate additional space for subsystems.

tech_bio_reactor.name: Bio-Reactor
tech_bio_reactor.description: A facility where organic matter is converted into energy at a highly efficient rate.

tech_bio_reactor_2.name: Advanced Bio-Reactor
tech_bio_reactor_2.description: A facility where organic matter is converted into energy at a highly efficient rate, improvements in waste collection allows harvesting of useful gaseous by-products.

tech_biomechanics.name: Biomechanics
tech_biomechanics.description: Millions of years of organic evolution will sometimes, through sheer persistence, produce elegant solutions that can also be applied to machine designs.

tech_boarding_cables.name: Boarding Cables
tech_boarding_cables.description: Repurposed small-caliber artillery that fire piercing hooks attached to resilient carbon fiber cables, perfect for immobilizing and boarding enemy ships.

source.name: Captain Inax of the Black Needle

tech_btc_1.name: Star Cracker
tech_btc_1.description: A beam of directed tachyon energy is fired into the star, triggering a supernova. The incredible energy released by this event is then used to generate vast quantities of dark matter.\n\nWhen the star detonates, ALL colonies, megastructures, and stations in the system are destroyed - including our own. All fleets in the system will go MIA. The Star-Eater itself is the only exception.

tech_capacity_boosters.name: Capacity Boosters
tech_capacity_boosters.description: We leave nothing to chance, no matter the cost. Through exacting curation of DNA banks do we build the leaders of tomorrow.

tech_capital_productivity_1.name: Improved Production
tech_capital_productivity_1.description: As our colonies become more developed, we can gain significant improvements to our throughput.

tech_capital_productivity_2.name: Efficiencies of Scale
tech_capital_productivity_2.description: Increased population density gives us an opportunity to further increase productivity.

tech_capital_productivity_3.name: Maximized Productivity
tech_capital_productivity_3.description: Continued advancements in technology allow our most developed planets to reach productivity levels unheard of in earlier times.

tech_centralized_command.name: Centralized Command
tech_centralized_command.description: Creating dedicated headquarters for all levels of military operations shapes an efficient fleet, and lays a better foundation for future military training.

grants: Unlocks Arkship Class: Civilian — Arkship (Civilian)\nMore than a vessel, the Civilian Arkship is a world unto itself. Its infrastructure supports a complete society in motion, carrying with it everything needed to thrive across the stars.

tech_civilian_arkship.name: Civilian Arkships
tech_civilian_arkship.description: More than a vessel, the Civilian Arkship is a world unto itself. Its infrastructure supports a complete society in motion, carrying with it everything needed to thrive across the stars.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Climate Restoration — Climate Restoration\nAllows us to terraform ecologically devastated worlds.

tech_climate_restoration.name: Climate Restoration
tech_climate_restoration.description: By advancing our understanding of atmospheric transformation, we will be able to terraform even the most ecologically devastated worlds.

grants: Unlocks Component: Basic Cloaking Field Generator — Basic Cloaking Field Generator\nA modified particle field allows our vessels to effectively 'hide' in open space. However, this comes at the cost of destabilizing other forms of energy shielding which would otherwise protect the ship.

tech_cloaking_1.name: Basic Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_1.description: A modified particle field allows our vessels to effectively 'hide' in open space. However, this comes at the cost of destabilizing other forms of energy shielding which would otherwise protect the ship.

grants: Unlocks Component: Advanced Cloaking Field Generator — Advanced Cloaking Field Generator\nAdvancements in rare crystal lensing technology have greatly improved cloaking efficiency.

tech_cloaking_2.name: Advanced Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_2.description: Advancements in rare crystal lensing technology have greatly improved cloaking efficiency.

grants: Unlocks Component: Elite Cloaking Field Generator — Elite Cloaking Field Generator\nTypical cloaking technology can play havoc with a ship's more delicate instruments. However, these elite fields render such concerns obsolete.

tech_cloaking_3.name: Elite Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_3.description: Typical cloaking technology can play havoc with a ship's more delicate instruments. However, these elite fields render such concerns obsolete.

grants: Unlocks Component: Dark Matter Cloaking Field Generator — Dark Matter Cloaking Field Generator\nThis device uses dark matter to warp space-time around the vessel, making it incredibly difficult to detect.

tech_cloaking_dark_matter.name: Dark Matter Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_dark_matter.description: This device uses dark matter to warp space-time around the vessel, making it incredibly difficult to detect.

grants: Unlocks Component: Psi-Phase Field Generator — Psi-Phase Field Generator\nPsi-Phase Field Generators focus the psionic potential of the ship's crew to partially phase the vessel into the Shroud. This allows the ship to remain undetected by all but the best sensor arrays, though what the crew may be forced to witness is better left unsaid.

tech_cloaking_psi.name: Psi-Phase Field Generator
tech_cloaking_psi.description: Psi-Phase Field Generators focus the psionic potential of the ship's crew to partially phase the vessel into the Shroud. This allows the ship to remain undetected by all but the best sensor arrays, though what the crew may be forced to witness is better left unsaid.

tech_cloning.name: Cloning
tech_cloning.description: Breakthroughs in enucleation and artificial womb technology allows for the mass-production of individuals based on a common genetic template.

grants: Unlocks Component: Cold Fusion Reactor — Cold Fusion Reactor\nThe ability to sustain a fusion reaction at relatively low temperatures will result in a new generation of fusion reactors for our ships.

tech_cold_fusion_power.name: Cold Fusion Power
tech_cold_fusion_power.description: The ability to sustain a fusion reaction at relatively low temperatures will result in a new generation of fusion reactors for our ships.

tech_collective_self.name: The Collective Self
tech_collective_self.description: Finding aspects of the self within the group is natural and inevitable; eventually those shared aspects must be valued higher than individual identities.

tech_colonial_bureaucracy.name: Colonial Bureaucracy
tech_colonial_bureaucracy.description: Local administrative developments allow for closer supervision of colonial affairs without excessively burdening central decision-making.

tech_colonial_centralization.name: Colonial Centralization
tech_colonial_centralization.description: Robust frameworks for local governance created on a per-case basis, to meet each colony's needs.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Colony Ship — Colony Ship\nColony Ships are single-use vessels for settling on alien worlds. Upon colonization, the ship is scuttled and converted into a planetary shelter and foothold.

tech_colonization_1.name: New Worlds Protocol
tech_colonization_1.description: Calculating required resources and gear required to establish a planetary colony allows us to herd brave pioneers into grand colony ships, confident that they will survive the long voyage across the stars to a new home.

tech_colonization_2.name: Atmospheric Filtering
tech_colonization_2.description: By adjusting atmospheric filtering on a per-site basis to better filter out undesirable elements, colonial living conditions may be improved.

tech_colonization_3.name: Hostile Environment Adaptation
tech_colonization_3.description: Further study into the hazardous environments found on other planets help alleviate the difficulties that colonizers encounter in their day-to-day lives on foreign worlds.

tech_colonization_4.name: Foreign Soil Enrichment
tech_colonization_4.description: Extensive study into different soil types and their ability to support crops will help improve the living conditions of our settlers on foreign worlds.

tech_colonization_5.name: Eco-Integration Studies
tech_colonization_5.description: Additional study into different planetary climates will allow us to settle our population on worlds previously thought too hostile to support them.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Colossus — Colossus\nLarger than even a Titan, the Colossus hull configuration has no ship-to-ship combat capability. It is more of a mobile orbital station, capable only of complete planetary devastation.

tech_colossus.name: Colossi
tech_colossus.description: Advances in mega-engineering blur the lines between reality and fantasy in the form of Colossus-type military vessels. These immense, single-weapon platforms are capable of radically altering or obliterating entire worlds at the push of a button.

grants: Unlocks Component: Basic Combat Roles — Basic Combat Roles\nRecent progress in AI behavioral theory allows us to designate specific combat roles to our shipboard computers.

tech_combat_computers_1.name: Specialized Combat Computers
tech_combat_computers_1.description: Active matrices tuned for specific combat-centric tasks greatly improve engagement efficiency.

grants: Unlocks Component: Advanced Combat Roles — Advanced Combat Roles\nFurther advances in adaptive combat algorithms enables our shipboard AI to handle its assigned role far more effectively.

tech_combat_computers_2.name: Extended Combat Algorithms
tech_combat_computers_2.description: Further advances in predictive algorithms allow for augmented tactical decision-making in the field.

grants: Unlocks Component: Sapient Combat AI — Sapient Combat AI\nExploiting our sapient AI's sense of self-preservation, or fear of death, should greatly enhance its responsiveness in combat.

tech_combat_computers_3.name: Sapient Combat Simulations
tech_combat_computers_3.description: Running sapient AIs through high-intensity combat simulations yields valuable insight into potential optimizations for risk-evaluation techniques.

grants: Unlocks Component: Autonomous Ship Intellects — Autonomous Ship Intellects\nGranting our ships their own semi-autonomous intellect will greatly enhance their responsiveness in combat.

tech_combat_computers_autonomous.name: Autonomous Ship Intellects
tech_combat_computers_autonomous.description: Granting our ships their own semi-autonomous intellect will greatly enhance their responsiveness in combat.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Combat Computers upgrades for Space Fauna

tech_combat_computers_bio_integration.name: Combat Computer Bio-integration
tech_combat_computers_bio_integration.description: We can develop specialized neurochips to influence the behavior of space fauna involved in wide scale fleet combat.

tech_combat_training.name: Combat Training
tech_combat_training.description: A more extensive training program for new recruits, including realistic combat scenarios, prepare them for the field.

tech_command_matrix.name: Command Matrix
tech_command_matrix.description: Restructuring the chain of command and deciding what interdependencies are set between officers, make fleets more responsive and effective.

tech_compact_living.name: Compact Living
tech_compact_living.description: While no one civilization has the perfect solution to the ever-expanding challenge of governing a growing nation, we have found a partial solution. After studying a multitude of species and governments, we have discovered an outstanding balance of flexibility and function.

tech_consecration_fields.name: Consecration Fields
tech_consecration_fields.description: Through our understanding of physics and field manipulation, our holy places shall we seen and felt by all.

tech_construction_templates.name: Construction Templates
tech_construction_templates.description: Standardized pre-fab templates massively reduce on-site facility construction times.

tech_consumer_good_refinement_1.name: Market Analysis Algorithms
tech_consumer_good_refinement_1.description: Basic administrative AIs can be used to streamline supply and demand lines, reducing waste.

tech_consumer_good_refinement_2.name: Predictive Consumerism
tech_consumer_good_refinement_2.description: Using advanced AIs, we can reliably predict consumer demand before it exists.

grants: Unlocks Component: Curator Containment Protocols — Gravity Snares capture double the amount of Space Fauna.

tech_containment_vessel.name: Curator Containment Protocols
tech_containment_vessel.description: Gravity Snares capture double the amount of Space Fauna.

tech_controlled_mutations.name: Controlled Mutations
tech_controlled_mutations.description: We can increase the effectiveness of our Space Fauna Ships by modifying their genomes, allowing us to integrate artificial technology into their biomass.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Unique Mutations — Unique Mutations\nUnique Mutations are powerful mutations that can be applied only once and can sometimes be limited to a specific kind of Space Fauna. More Unique Mutations can be discovered from cloning and hunting.

tech_controlled_mutations_2.name: Advanced Controlled Mutations
tech_controlled_mutations_2.description: We can go further. Advanced manipulation of Space Fauna genetics allows for integrating a wider variety of specialized components.

grants:
Corvette Build Cost: -5%
Corvette Build Speed: +25%
Frigate Build Cost: -5%
Frigate Build Speed: +25%

tech_corvette_build_speed.name: Standardized Corvette Patterns
tech_corvette_build_speed.description: Establishing new standards for the modeling and construction of corvettes greatly improves the efficiency of the production pipeline.

tech_corvette_hull_1.name: Improved Corvette Hulls
tech_corvette_hull_1.description: Advances in building techniques will allow for the construction of sturdier and more durable corvettes.

tech_corvette_hull_2.name: Advanced Corvette Hulls
tech_corvette_hull_2.description: The latest generation of corvette hulls have optimized structural integrity fields and improved bulkheads.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Corvette — Corvette\nThe Corvette is the most basic military ship, armed and ready in the event of hostile contacts.

tech_corvettes.name: Corvettes
tech_corvettes.description: The FTL breakthrough allowed early attempts to adapt traditional surface-to-space shuttle frames to military applications to finally create relatively small, fast, and maneuverable vessels with limited firepower.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Paradox Titan — Paradox Titan\nThese formidable ships are closer to mobile fortresses than anything else, and only the most brutal assaults have a chance to damage them.

tech_cosmogenesis_FE_titan.name: Paradox Titan
tech_cosmogenesis_FE_titan.description: These formidable ships are closer to mobile fortresses than anything else, and only the most brutal assaults have a chance to damage them.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Enigma Battlecruiser — Enigma Battlecruiser\nAnother optimized spacecraft, this time of larger dimensions, will make current Battleships look like toys.

tech_cosmogenesis_battlecruiser.name: Enigma Battlecruiser
tech_cosmogenesis_battlecruiser.description: Another optimized spacecraft, this time of larger dimensions, will make current Battleships look like toys.

grants: Unlocks Cosmogenesis Crisis Level 2 — Exponential Learning Theory\nTo uncover the inner workings of reality, we must open our minds to a grander scale of thinking.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_1.name: Exponential Learning Theory
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_1.description: The radical shift in perspective required to comprehend the infinite layers of reality challenges even our most brilliant minds.

grants: Unlocks Cosmogenesis Crisis Level 3 — Gravitic Brush\nGravity is merely one brush we could use to paint upon the canvas of reality.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_2.name: Gravitic Brush
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_2.description: Gravity and spacetime shape the universe. Starting with gravity, we will master tools to power our ascension.

grants: Unlocks Cosmogenesis Crisis Level 4 — Theoretical Infinity Thesis\nOne by one, pinpricks of gravitational force will allow us to pierce through spacetime.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_3.name: Theoretical Infinity Thesis
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_3.description: Precise and incredibly minute alterations in gravity allow us to inject commands into the code of reality. Extreme caution is imperative as we learn the applications of this new and incredible tool.

grants: Unlocks Cosmogenesis Crisis Level 5 — The Rules of Reality\nReality groans; it protests and grumbles, stubbornly reshaping itself despite our alterations. This unexpected development cannot be allowed to continue.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_4.name: The Rules of Reality
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_4.description: Recent experiments confirm that our edits to reality are only temporary. More significant alterations will be necessary to anchor these changes.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Horizon Needle — Horizon Needle\nA technological marvel, the Horizon Needle is a civilian ship with reality-bending capabilities. It can house our population and our accumulated knowledge to safely shepherd the trans-universal migration.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_5.name: Nascent Universes
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_5.description: Large-scale travel to different universes is a daunting task. We must engineer a spacecraft that can not only pierce the fabric of spacetime but also survive the journey.\n\nFallen Empires will try to stop us!

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Riddle Escort — Riddle Escort\nA starship of modest size that optimizes our knowledge of spacetime to enact dimensional transcendentalism, making the inside bigger than its outward shape suggests. Advanced firepower capabilities come at a reduced logistical cost compared to traditional ship designs.

tech_cosmogenesis_escort.name: Riddle Escort
tech_cosmogenesis_escort.description: A starship of modest size that optimizes our knowledge of spacetime to enact dimensional transcendentalism, making the inside bigger than its outward shape suggests. Advanced firepower capabilities come at a reduced logistical cost compared to traditional ship designs.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Maze Harbinger — Maze Harbinger\nThese Harbingers nest their strike craft in interwoven pocket dimensions, each ship a labyrinth of impossible hangars, capable of deploying a fleet's worth of firepower.

tech_cosmogenesis_harbinger.name: Maze Harbinger
tech_cosmogenesis_harbinger.description: These Harbingers nest their strike craft in interwoven pocket dimensions, each ship a labyrinth of impossible hangars, capable of deploying a fleet's worth of firepower.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Cipher Mauler — Cipher Mauler\nThrough organic spacetime-dimensional transcendentalism, this Mauler is larger on the inside its compact frame concealing a dense tangle of musculature. Capable of a bite deadlier than physics should allow.

tech_cosmogenesis_mauler.name: Cipher Mauler
tech_cosmogenesis_mauler.description: Through organic spacetime-dimensional transcendentalism, this Mauler is larger on the inside its compact frame concealing a dense tangle of musculature. Capable of a bite deadlier than physics should allow.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Cryptic Stinger — Cryptic Stinger\nBrimming with more weapon systems than its power source should sustain, this Stinger shouldn't function, and yet, it fires. Continuously.

tech_cosmogenesis_stinger.name: Cryptic Stinger
tech_cosmogenesis_stinger.description: Brimming with more weapon systems than its power source should sustain, this Stinger shouldn't function, and yet, it fires. Continuously.

grants: Attempt to bend the Rules of Reality — These dangerous experiments will have unpredictable results.

tech_cosmogenesis_thesis.name: Applied Infinity Thesis
tech_cosmogenesis_thesis.description: By making further alterations to reality's rules, we can better monitor its reactions. At this scale, the effects are still difficult to predict, and could affect the entire galaxy.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Quandary Weaver — Matrix Weaver\nEquipped with support weapon arrays that outstrip its visible anatomy, the Quandary Weaver rewrites spatial norms. Alone, it can shift the momentum of entire battles.

tech_cosmogenesis_weaver.name: Quandary Weaver
tech_cosmogenesis_weaver.description: Equipped with support weapon arrays that outstrip its visible anatomy, the Quandary Weaver rewrites spatial norms. Alone, it can shift the momentum of entire battles.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Synaptic Lathe — Synaptic Lathe\nColossal in scale, the Synaptic Lathe is a reservoir computer. The processing power of our population's networked minds is used to compute and store data. The benefits are obvious, but some misguided species may view the transmutation of individuals into computing chips as morally questionable.

tech_cosmogenesis_world.name: Scalable Reservoir Computing
tech_cosmogenesis_world.description: Colossal in scale, the Synaptic Lathe is a reservoir computer. The processing power of our population's networked minds is used to compute and store data. The benefits are obvious, but some misguided species may view the transmutation of individuals into computing chips as morally questionable.

tech_covenant_composer.name: Mark of the Composer
tech_covenant_composer.description: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

tech_covenant_cradle.name: Mark of the Cradle
tech_covenant_cradle.description: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

tech_covenant_eater.name: Mark of the Eater
tech_covenant_eater.description: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

tech_covenant_instrument.name: Mark of the Instrument
tech_covenant_instrument.description: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

tech_covenant_whisperers.name: Mark of the Whisperers
tech_covenant_whisperers.description: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

tech_critter_feeder.name: Fruit Gardens
tech_critter_feeder.description: Vacuum gardens full of bio-engineered fruits, genetically enhanced to attract spaceborne fauna.

tech_cruiser_build_speed.name: Standardized Cruiser Patterns
tech_cruiser_build_speed.description: Establishing new standards for the modeling and construction of cruisers greatly improves the efficiency of the production pipeline.

tech_cruiser_hull_1.name: Improved Cruiser Hulls
tech_cruiser_hull_1.description: Advances in building techniques will allow for the construction of sturdier and more durable cruisers.

tech_cruiser_hull_2.name: Advanced Cruiser Hulls
tech_cruiser_hull_2.description: The latest generation of cruiser hulls have optimized structural integrity fields and improved bulkheads.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Cruiser — Cruiser\nThe Cruiser is the first three-section design, allowing for a wide range of module configurations for those willing to pay the price.

tech_cruisers.name: Cruisers
tech_cruisers.description: Originally devised as an experimental next-generation colony ship hull configuration, the design's ample hardpoints made it ideal for carrying heavy weapons ordnance.

tech_cryostasis_1.name: Automated Colony Ships
tech_cryostasis_1.description: By giving control of the colony ship to the on-board computer, the crew and colonists can be placed in suspended animation.

tech_cryostasis_2.name: Self-Aware Colony Ships
tech_cryostasis_2.description: Sufficiently advanced systems are capable of optimizing themselves if they are made acutely aware of the purpose for which they were made.

tech_cryovault.name: Frozen World Habitats
tech_cryovault.description: By harnessing the subthermal dynamics found in the environments of frozen worlds, we can create more hospitable living conditions in colder climates.

tech_crystal_armor_1.name: Crystal-Infused Plating
tech_crystal_armor_1.description: By infusing armor plating with Crystalline matter we are able to further increase the durability of our ships' protective hulls.

tech_crystal_armor_2.name: Crystal-Forged Plating
tech_crystal_armor_2.description: Introducing Crystalline matter into the forging process further improves the ultra-hard qualities of crystal-infused metals.

tech_cultural_heritage.name: Sociocultural History
tech_cultural_heritage.description: An understanding of a shared past is necessary in order to make any significant strides into the future.

grants: Unlocks Component: Curator Exploration Lab — These shipboard lab facilities incorporate advanced technologies from the ancient Curator Order to further increase survey speeds.

tech_curator_lab.name: Curator Exploration Lab
tech_curator_lab.description: These shipboard lab facilities incorporate advanced technologies from the ancient Curator Order to further increase survey speeds.

tech_dangerous_wildlife.name: Dangerous Wildlife Removal
tech_dangerous_wildlife.description: Tactical disruption of natural habitats combined with converging search-and-destroy patterns can effectively eliminate hostile wildlife in a very short span of time.

tech_dark_matter_deflector.name: Dark Matter Deflectors
tech_dark_matter_deflector.description: These deflectors utilize dark matter to deflect incoming projectiles in a way that seems to utterly defy the laws of nature.

tech_dark_matter_detection.name: Dark Matter Detection
tech_dark_matter_detection.description: Dark matter resonance chambers will significantly improve the performance of our detection arrays.

grants: Unlocks Component: Dark Matter Reactor — Dark Matter Reactor\nThese generators appear to somehow draw energy directly from dark matter, providing more ship power than should be possible according to the laws of physics.

tech_dark_matter_power_core.name: Dark Matter Power
tech_dark_matter_power_core.description: These generators appear to somehow draw energy directly from dark matter, providing more ship power than should be possible according to the laws of physics.

grants: Unlocks Component: Dark Matter Thrusters — Dark Matter Thrusters\nThese ship thrusters utilize Dark Matter technology to generate propulsion in a manner that appears to defy numerous laws of physics.

tech_dark_matter_propulsion.name: Dark Matter Propulsion
tech_dark_matter_propulsion.description: These ship thrusters utilize Dark Matter technology to generate propulsion in a manner that appears to defy numerous laws of physics.

tech_decryption_1.name: Quantum Hacking
tech_decryption_1.description: Primitive encryption systems stand no chance against modern decryption tools.

tech_decryption_2.name: Simulated Social Engineering
tech_decryption_2.description: The weakest link in any security system are the individuals within it. By modeling their weaknesses in computer simulations we can find novel ways to bypass their security - or trick them into bypassing it for us.

tech_decryption_3.name: Quasi-Dimensional Reflection
tech_decryption_3.description: Our operatives can access data from adjacent realities without risking setting off alarms in this reality.

tech_deep_sinkhole.name: Subterranean Colonization
tech_deep_sinkhole.description: Many planets exhibit extensive subsurface voids. Subterranean exploration, exploitation, and construction techniques can greatly increase the habitable area of some worlds.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Deep Space Citadel — A Deep Space Citadel is an armored Starbase designed for maximum defense within a stellar gravity well.

tech_deep_space_citadel.name: Deep Space Citadel
tech_deep_space_citadel.description: A Deep Space Citadel is an armored Starbase designed for maximum defense within a stellar gravity well.

tech_defense_platform_hull_1.name: Improved Structural Integrity
tech_defense_platform_hull_1.description: A reinforced framework and blast shields with enhanced impact absorption will ensure the structural integrity of the platform even under immense pressure.

tech_dense_jungle.name: Selective Defoliants
tech_dense_jungle.description: Thorough cataloging, gene sequencing, and computer modeling of exobotanical ecosystems, coupled with gene editing and dispersal mechanisms, will allow us to reshape alien plant communities to our liking.

tech_destroyer_build_speed.name: Standardized Destroyer Patterns
tech_destroyer_build_speed.description: Establishing new standards for the modeling and construction of destroyers greatly improves the efficiency of the production pipeline.

tech_destroyer_hull_1.name: Improved Destroyer Hulls
tech_destroyer_hull_1.description: Advances in building techniques will allow for the construction of sturdier and more durable destroyers.

tech_destroyer_hull_2.name: Advanced Destroyer Hulls
tech_destroyer_hull_2.description: The latest generation of destroyer hulls have optimized structural integrity fields and improved bulkheads.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Destroyer — Destroyer\nAs a larger two-section design, the Destroyer offers a broad array of strategic armament options.

tech_destroyers.name: Destroyers
tech_destroyers.description: While larger than Corvettes, Destroyer hull configurations still make for comparatively nimble gunboats.

tech_detection_array.name: Detection Array
tech_detection_array.description: A high-powered suite of external sensors, capable of detecting cloaked fleets.\n

tech_disruptors_1.name: Disruptors
tech_disruptors_1.description: Disruptors fire high-energy bolts that weaken and destroy the molecular bonds that hold the target's constituent atoms together. They are capable of passing through shields and armor to wreak havoc directly on enemy hull and crew.

tech_disruptors_2.name: Ion Disruptors
tech_disruptors_2.description: These upgraded disruptors fire bolts of more destructive ion particles at targets.

tech_disruptors_3.name: Phase Disruptors
tech_disruptors_3.description: Extremely high-yield disruptors that fire quantum energy charges causing incredible damage to those unfortunate enough to get in their way.

tech_doctrine_fleet_size_1.name: Doctrine: Space Combat
tech_doctrine_fleet_size_1.description: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

tech_doctrine_fleet_size_2.name: Doctrine: Reactive Formations
tech_doctrine_fleet_size_2.description: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

tech_doctrine_fleet_size_3.name: Doctrine: Interstellar Warfare
tech_doctrine_fleet_size_3.description: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

tech_doctrine_fleet_size_4.name: Doctrine: Fluid Fleet Templates
tech_doctrine_fleet_size_4.description: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

tech_doctrine_fleet_size_5.name: Doctrine: Armada Battle Formation
tech_doctrine_fleet_size_5.description: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

tech_doctrine_navy_size_1.name: Doctrine: Fleet Support
tech_doctrine_navy_size_1.description: As extrasolar expeditions become more common, it is important to provide planetside relief for returning fleets.

tech_doctrine_navy_size_2.name: Doctrine: Support Vessels
tech_doctrine_navy_size_2.description: A fleet does not run on zeal alone. To ensure steady access to critical supplies, we should organize our logistics corps into dedicated support vessels.

tech_doctrine_navy_size_3.name: Doctrine: Interstellar Logistics
tech_doctrine_navy_size_3.description: Amateurs talk about tactics. Professionals study logistics. By ensuring our fleets are regularly and efficiently supplied, we can increase the number of vessels we can effectively support.

tech_doctrine_navy_size_4.name: Doctrine: Fleet Liaisons
tech_doctrine_navy_size_4.description: By maintaining a professional corps of fleet liaisons, we can improve communications and the flow of orders throughout the chain of command.

tech_dragon_armor.name: Artificial Dragonscales
tech_dragon_armor.description: The Ether Drake's scales are made up of multiple layers of unique mineral nanostructures. Unorthodox manufacturing techniques allow us to closely emulate these self-repairing structures.

tech_droid_workers.name: Artificial Specialists
tech_droid_workers.description: Upgraded artificial units have an expanded movement range equal to that of most organics. Their neural processors have also been greatly improved.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Stellar Cannon — Allows us to shoot our energy stockpile at targeted systems

tech_dyson_gun.name: Stellar Cannon
tech_dyson_gun.description: Allows us to shoot our energy stockpile at targeted systems

tech_dyson_sphere.name: Dyson Sphere
tech_dyson_sphere.description: A Dyson Sphere fully envelops a given star, converting all solar output directly to  Energy Credits.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Dyson Swarm — An array of interlinked satellites, the Dyson Swarm is designed to improve the output of stellar deposits.

tech_dyson_swarm.name: Dyson Swarm
tech_dyson_swarm.description: An array of interlinked satellites, the Dyson Swarm is designed to improve the output of stellar deposits.

tech_eco_simulation.name: Eco Simulation
tech_eco_simulation.description: Farming techniques can be further refined through sophisticated computer simulations of different environments and weather patterns. This allows for more predictable crop yields.

tech_ecological_adaptation.name: Ecological Adaptation
tech_ecological_adaptation.description: By adapting planetary ecosystems to large-scale environmental changes we can turn terraformation into a less disruptive process.

tech_effective_bureaucracy.name: Effective Bureaucracy
tech_effective_bureaucracy.description: Improved algorithms for processing and organizing vast amounts of data has streamlined decision-making and information-sharing throughout the empire.

tech_embodied_dynamism.name: Embodied Dynamism
tech_embodied_dynamism.description: Initiative and some measure of ambition must be promoted in our autonomous leader units, while still making certain that they do not stray too far from the directives of the core intelligence.

tech_encryption_1.name: Quantum Firewalls
tech_encryption_1.description: Advances in computing technology have given us new ways to protect our data from prying eyes.

tech_encryption_2.name: Simultaneous-Collapse Storage
tech_encryption_2.description: Further advances in unstable entanglement have given us new ways to prevent unauthorized intrusions into our databases.

tech_encryption_3.name: Negative-Time Keys
tech_encryption_3.description: Our latest advances in encryption exploit recently discovered quirks of physics to require inputting a specialized key before it has been generated.

tech_energy_lance_1.name: Particle Lances
tech_energy_lance_1.description: These heavy energy weapons fire focused particle beams that cause massive damage. The size of the emitter arrays limits their use to battleships and titans.

tech_energy_lance_2.name: Tachyon Lances
tech_energy_lance_2.description: A more powerful version of the particle lance, this weapon fires a tachyon beam of immense power. Like its predecessor, its use is limited to battleships and titans.

tech_energy_torpedoes_1.name: Proton Launchers
tech_energy_torpedoes_1.description: These energy projectiles consist of tightly concentrated protons capable of causing immense damage to the hull of enemy ships.

tech_energy_torpedoes_2.name: Neutron Launchers
tech_energy_torpedoes_2.description: Upgraded energy projectiles that rely on neutrons instead of protons for their destructive power.

tech_engineering_1.name: Nanomechanics
tech_engineering_1.description: Further breakthroughs in mechanical engineering required us to descend to the nanometric scale. We are now able to manipulate physical systems in never-before-seen ways.

tech_engineering_2.name: Self-Connecting Circuitry
tech_engineering_2.description: Much as organic neurons reforge lost connections by means of axonal sprouting, these circuits are capable of self-overhaul. Even the simplest computing systems are now expected to evolve while in use.

tech_engineering_3.name: Supersolid Materials
tech_engineering_3.description: The quantum mechanical properties of these materials hold the key to superposition states, a revolutionary development for both material and industrial science.

tech_enhanced_cryosleep_sedatives.name: Enhanced Cryosleep Sedatives
tech_enhanced_cryosleep_sedatives.description: Sedatives based on a rare enzyme enable enhanced cryosleep, greatly improving organic species' tolerance of long-distance space travel.

tech_enigmatic_decoder.name: Enigmatic Decoder
tech_enigmatic_decoder.description: While producing average results in standard tests, the accuracy of Enigmatic Decoder's prediction algorithms seemingly increases as the target's flight path grows more erratic.

tech_enigmatic_encoder.name: Enigmatic Encoder
tech_enigmatic_encoder.description: The Enigmatic Encoder scrambles flight path data according to some indeterminable design before feeding it back to fleet command.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Epigenetic Triggers — Allows us to remove Presapient Traits from Biological Species through Species Modification.

tech_epigenetic_triggers.name: Epigenetic Triggers
tech_epigenetic_triggers.description: Advanced DNA methylation techniques allow for functionally significant alterations to be made to arbitrary genomes.

tech_executive_retreat.name: Executive Leisure Program
tech_executive_retreat.description: A luxurious resort complex for high ranking corporate officers. Here they can sample the local culture in a high security environment.

tech_existential_campaigns.name: Existential Campaigns
tech_existential_campaigns.description: When survival itself is at stake, the very concept of war loses its meaning. These campaigns are waged not for dominion, but to secure the continued existence of our civilization.

tech_exotic_gases.name: Exotic Gas Refining
tech_exotic_gases.description: Exotic Gas can be produced artificially, but it is a difficult process that requires advanced refinery equipment.

tech_experimental_subspace_navigation.name: Speculative Hyperlane Breaching
tech_experimental_subspace_navigation.description: Solitary Science Ships can break out of the naturally-occurring hyperlanes and attempt to navigate to known but otherwise unreachable destinations.

tech_extradimensional_weapon_1.name: Extradimensional Weaponry
tech_extradimensional_weapon_1.description: Applying 5th-dimensional energy manipulation principles on lower dimensional planes allows for the creation of powerful energy weapons.

tech_fe_administration_1.name: Fractal Administration Processes
tech_fe_administration_1.description: Our administrative requirements will likewise expand as our mastery of advanced technology evolves. We must adeptly cater to the demands of our burgeoning empire.

tech_fe_administration_2.name: Quantic Administration Processes
tech_fe_administration_2.description: Our technology now surpasses any administrative requirement. The expertise needed to seamlessly govern a galactic empire is firmly within our reach.

tech_fe_affluence_1.name: Affluence Emporium
tech_fe_affluence_1.description: This center anticipates and fulfills material desires using an advanced procurement algorithm, delivering satisfaction before the populace realizes their wants.

tech_fe_affluence_2.name: Affluence Center
tech_fe_affluence_2.description: This center effortlessly materializes the most outlandish desires at a moment's notice.

tech_fe_assembly_1.name: Robot Manufacturing Nexus
tech_fe_assembly_1.description: An avant-garde assembly complex manned by expert Roboticists, this facility transcends conventional bounds, meticulously realizing the forefront of robotic innovation.

tech_fe_assembly_2.name: Robot Quantum Production Hub
tech_fe_assembly_2.description: A marvel in engineering, this facility's quantic assembly line uses entanglement converters to craft machine parts down to the most minute detail. Not a single atom is misplaced.

tech_fe_clinic_1.name: Molecular-Revitalization Institute
tech_fe_clinic_1.description: Molecular-Revitalization Institutes delve deep into cellular intricacies to amplify the effectiveness of medical treatments, significantly improving the quality and longevity of the populations' health.

tech_fe_clinic_2.name: Bioregeneration Institute
tech_fe_clinic_2.description: The Bioregeneration Institute, at the pinnacle of medical technology, pioneers groundbreaking bio-regenerative therapies, continuously redefining the boundaries of life extension.

tech_fe_dome_1.name: Sky Dome
tech_fe_dome_1.description: This floating city, propelled by state-of-the-art anti-gravity technology, provides an idyllic haven for its inhabitants.

tech_fe_dome_2.name: Empyrean Dome
tech_fe_dome_2.description: Suspended by gravimetric nullification, these domes transcend physical limitations, while advanced life support systems seamlessly cater to inhabitants' needs.

tech_fe_entertainment_1.name: Virtual Bliss Plaza
tech_fe_entertainment_1.description: These immense entertainment sectors are at the forefront of recreation and leisure. Brainwave readers allow for instantaneous and personalized virtual getaways.

tech_fe_entertainment_2.name: Omni-Bliss Nexus
tech_fe_entertainment_2.description: A colossal culmination of entertainment, this nexus transcends conventional limits, where dreams materialize before desires are realized.

tech_fe_fabricator_1.name: Dimensional Replicator
tech_fe_fabricator_1.description: This fabricator's technology achieves flawless conversion from energy to matter.

tech_fe_fabricator_2.name: Dimensional Fabricator
tech_fe_fabricator_2.description: This advanced fabricator seamlessly tunnels into the fabric of dimensional space, extracting valuable resources.

tech_fe_forge_1.name: Hyper-Forge
tech_fe_forge_1.description: This forge's production speed is limited only by the quantity of resources loaded into it.

tech_fe_forge_2.name: Auto-Forge
tech_fe_forge_2.description: The expansive nano-replicator bays in this forge transform raw materials into advanced alloys with marvelous efficiency.

tech_fe_fortress_1.name: Aspis Bastion
tech_fe_fortress_1.description: This colossal planetary defense complex has numerous armories and layers of shielding. Only a highly specialized siege force could breach its defenses.

tech_fe_fortress_2.name: Aegis Complex
tech_fe_fortress_2.description: This monumental planetary defense complex protects with countless armories and shielding; the planet's mountains will crumble before its defenses.

tech_fe_lab_1.name: Quantum Innovation Nexus
tech_fe_lab_1.description: This nexus boasts state-of-the-art equipment and an unprecedented staff capacity, ushering in an era where quantum theories are not just explored but harnessed for groundbreaking innovation.

tech_fe_lab_2.name: Transcendental Innovation Department
tech_fe_lab_2.description: This building is the apex of scientific advancement and proves this is an era of boundless innovation.

tech_fe_market_1.name: Galactic Commerce Hub
tech_fe_market_1.description: Dominating the skyline, these towering spires cast shadows across the bustling trade districts below.

tech_fe_market_2.name: Interstellar Commerce Nexus
tech_fe_market_2.description: Reigning supreme in the galactic economy, the colossal spires of this trade district can be seen from orbit.

tech_fe_mine_1.name: Quantum Drilling Plant
tech_fe_mine_1.description: This mining plant can find minerals anywhere in this planet's mantle using quantum tunneling technology to bore through solid materials without physical contact.

tech_fe_mine_2.name: Quantum Drilling Hub
tech_fe_mine_2.description: This mining hub can extract minerals anywhere down to the planet's outer core using quantum tunneling technology to bore through solid or liquid materials without physical contact.

tech_fe_nourishment_1.name: Nourishment Complex
tech_fe_nourishment_1.description: Replication technology swiftly conjures up novel flavors on command.

tech_fe_nourishment_2.name: Nourishment Center
tech_fe_nourishment_2.description: Every conceivable flavor can be replicated within these walls.

tech_fe_security_1.name: Justice Complex
tech_fe_security_1.description: This massive judicial complex seamlessly intertwines courts and law enforcement.

tech_fe_security_2.name: Ziggurat of Justice
tech_fe_security_2.description: The zenith of legal institutions, this colossal edifice is a monument to justice, harboring courts, holding facilities, and correctional facilities that will redeem even the most hardened criminals.

tech_fe_silo_1.name: Shrinkspace Depot
tech_fe_silo_1.description: The depot influences a portion of subspace where the distance between molecules is reduced, effectively shrinking anything stored there. Living beings are forbidden from entering it.

tech_fe_silo_2.name: Extra-Dimensional Depot
tech_fe_silo_2.description: By creating a localized pocket dimension, we can hold nearly endless resources.

tech_fe_singularity_1.name: Class-3 Singularity
tech_fe_singularity_1.description: Capturing the entire energy output from this singularity is an engineering marvel.

tech_fe_singularity_2.name: Class-4 Singularity
tech_fe_singularity_2.description: This singularity's power output challenges the laws of physics, yet the containment fields hold with unwavering stability.

tech_federation_code.name: Federation Code
tech_federation_code.description: A Federation must be more than goodwill and shared ambition. This code provides the groundwork for a unified interstellar order, ensuring cooperation and stability among its members.

grants: Unlocks Component: Fission Reactor — Fission Reactor\nThis energy source generates power for ships through induced fission, but it also produces harmful nuclear waste.

tech_fission_power.name: Fission Power
tech_fission_power.description: This energy source generates power for ships through induced fission, but it also produces harmful nuclear waste.

tech_flak_batteries_1.name: Flak Battery
tech_flak_batteries_1.description: Gun batteries that fire shrapnel rounds at close range. They are particularly lethal to enemy strike craft, but can also defend against missiles.

tech_flak_batteries_2.name: Flak Cannons
tech_flak_batteries_2.description: Upgraded flak batteries with new, more powerful shrapnel rounds.

tech_flak_batteries_3.name: Flak Artillery
tech_flak_batteries_3.description: Predictive tracking algorithms and even more powerful rounds make these batteries incredibly lethal to enemy strike craft.

tech_food_processing_1.name: Food Processing
tech_food_processing_1.description: Improved food processing techniques will lead to better preservation methods and less spoilage.

tech_food_processing_2.name: Advanced Food Processing
tech_food_processing_2.description: New cryopreservation and protein resequencing methods will make food processing much more efficient.

tech_frontier_health.name: Genetic Healthcare
tech_frontier_health.description: The colonization of alien worlds has opened up an entirely new field of biomedical research.

tech_frontier_hospital.name: Cyto-Revitalization
tech_frontier_hospital.description: As our empire grows, so does our understanding of biology. Advanced medical treatments on a cellular level have allowed for significant advancements in biological population health.

tech_ftl_inhibitor.name: FTL Inhibition
tech_ftl_inhibitor.description: Gravity well projectors can be used to create localized pockets of space where safe entry into hyperspace is impossible. The immense power requirements and the size of the projectors prohibits their use on anything smaller than a space station.

grants: Unlocks Component: Fusion Reactor — Fusion Reactor\nNuclear fusion processes generate a great amount of power for ships, but without many of the risks associated with fission power.

tech_fusion_power.name: Fusion Power
tech_fusion_power.description: Nuclear fusion processes generate a great amount of power for ships, but without many of the risks associated with fission power.

tech_galactic_administration.name: Galactic Administration
tech_galactic_administration.description: The administrative needs of a star empire are as numerous as they are complex. We will rise to the occasion.

tech_galactic_ambitions.name: Stellar Expansion
tech_galactic_ambitions.description: Our future lies in the sea of stars.

tech_galactic_archivism.name: Galactic Archivism
tech_galactic_archivism.description: The history of our galaxy warrants proper preservation in order to learn from those who came before us. An archive on the grandest scale would fit such a purpose.

tech_galactic_bureaucracy.name: Galactic Bureaucracy
tech_galactic_bureaucracy.description: Multiple administrative strata efficiently surface only the most vital information to the upper levels of government.

tech_galactic_campaigns.name: Galactic Campaigns
tech_galactic_campaigns.description: Further improvements to administration grant an extended power projection across the stars, and the military clout needed to enforce our demands.

tech_galactic_markets.name: Galactic Markets
tech_galactic_markets.description: By engaging in free trade of goods and services we allow for a more specialized economy, where an individual can excel in a narrow field and trade for their needs.

tech_gargantuan_evolution.name: Gargantuan Evolution
tech_gargantuan_evolution.description: Voidspawn eggs have evolved to withstand the harsh conditions of space by absorbing and conserving energy from their nearest star.

tech_gateway_activation.name: Gateway Activation
tech_gateway_activation.description: The ability to reactivate the derelict Gateway stations that can be found scattered throughout the galaxy has the potential to dramatically shorten travel times.

tech_gateway_construction.name: Gateway Construction
tech_gateway_construction.description: The construction of new Gateway stations enables us to build a fast-travel network that could revolutionize interstellar travel.

tech_gene_banks.name: Gene Banks
tech_gene_banks.description: Gene Banks filter and curate available genomes for deployment in clones.

tech_gene_crops.name: Gene Crops
tech_gene_crops.description: Sophisticated genetic engineering of crops helps increase yield and further improves both taste and nutrient levels.

grants: Unlocks Species Modifcation: Vocational Editing — ['concept_vocational_traits'] can be Removed with Species Modification
Unlocks Trait: Vocational Genomics — Allows us to add Vocational Genomics to Organic Species through Species Modification.

tech_gene_expressions.name: Targeted Gene Expressions
tech_gene_expressions.description: Stricter control of RNA and protein production on the cellular level.

tech_gene_seed_purification.name: Gene Seed Purification
tech_gene_seed_purification.description: Nucleotide purification techniques allow for the isolation and refinement of particularly desirable genetic traits.

tech_gene_tailoring.name: Gene Tailoring
tech_gene_tailoring.description: Making gene-editing tools widely available is sure to have a positive impact on our development as a species.

tech_genome_mapping.name: Genome Mapping
tech_genome_mapping.description: Mapping the genome of an individual through the sequencing of their DNA opens up for tailored medical treatments and therapies.

tech_georadiation_terraforming.name: Georadiation Terraforming
tech_georadiation_terraforming.description: By exposing the biosphere of a planet to molecular radiation decay, we promote the growth of certain resources while turning the world into a toxic wasteland.

tech_glandular_acclimation.name: Glandular Acclimation
tech_glandular_acclimation.description: Through glandular biological tailoring we can change the environmental tolerance of a species to suit our needs.

tech_global_defense_grid.name: Global Defense Grid
tech_global_defense_grid.description: The strategic value of a good defense remains as relevant today as it was to our predecessors in the far distant past. Technology does not render fortifications obsolete - it merely changes their requirements.

tech_global_production_strategy.name: Global Production Strategy
tech_global_production_strategy.description: Planets are big and production sites are often separated by vast distances. A coherent strategy for making certain that everyone is pulling in the same direction is often needed.

tech_global_research_initiative.name: Interplanetary Research Initiative
tech_global_research_initiative.description: A bid for interplanetary resource pools and more flexible research grants.

tech_gravity_snare_capacity_1.name: Micro Singularity Enhancements
tech_gravity_snare_capacity_1.description: Increases the amount of Space Fauna captured by Gravity Snares by 1

tech_gravity_snare_capacity_2.name: Gravity Manipulation Optimization
tech_gravity_snare_capacity_2.description: Increases the amount of Space Fauna captured by Gravity Snares by 1

tech_gravity_snare_capacity_3.name: Containment System Improvement
tech_gravity_snare_capacity_3.description: Increases the amount of Space Fauna captured by Gravity Snares by 1

tech_gravity_wells.name: Gravity Snares
tech_gravity_wells.description: Localized concentrations of quantum mass can be used to create short bursts of extreme gravity. If manipulated correctly, such a gravitational force could theoretically capture and contain a creature of any size without harm.

tech_ground_defense_planning.name: Ground Defense Planning
tech_ground_defense_planning.description: There are many alien empires who would gladly seize our worlds for themselves. We must be prepared for them, should the worst come to pass.

tech_growth_chamber_1.name: Growth Chamber
tech_growth_chamber_1.description: The construction of Growth Chambers enables the organic cultivation of biological ships within the fleet.

grants: [GetAdvancedGrowthChamberTitle] — Growth Chambers now provide +2 Shipyard Capacity.

tech_growth_chamber_2.name: Advanced Growth Chamber
tech_growth_chamber_2.description: The enhanced efficiency and capacity of Growth Chambers accelerates the cultivation of biological ships by refining their organic designs.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Habitat Central Complex — A Habitat Complex is a collection of self-sustaining orbitals designed for permanent habitation.

tech_habitat_1.name: Orbital Habitats
tech_habitat_1.description: Allows the construction of largely self-sustaining Orbital Habitats.

tech_habitat_2.name: Habitat Expansion
tech_habitat_2.description: Our early habitats were primitive things compared to the efficient designs we can now develop.

tech_habitat_3.name: Advanced Space Habitation
tech_habitat_3.description: Years of improvements to our Orbital Habitats have led us to create newer more effective designs.

tech_harbinger_build_speed.name: Standardized Harbinger Incubation
tech_harbinger_build_speed.description: These facilities nurture large biological ships, feeding them through advanced nutrient infusion to ensure resilience and combat readiness.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Mature Harbinger — Mature Harbinger\nEnhanced growth techniques yield stronger and more reliable vessels.

tech_harbinger_growth_1.name: Improved Harbinger Development
tech_harbinger_growth_1.description: Refined facilities employ sophisticated bio-engineering techniques to accelerate growth and enhance structural integrity. The resulting vessels feature improved endurance and increased combat efficiency.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Elder Harbinger — Elder Harbinger\nGrown for maximum strength and battlefield superiority.

tech_harbinger_growth_2.name: Advanced Harbinger Development
tech_harbinger_growth_2.description: Advanced incubation systems produce biological ships of exceptional durability and firepower. Genetic fine-tuning and superior growth environments create vessels capable of dominating the battlefield with unmatched resilience.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Juvenile Harbinger — Juvenile Harbinger\nThe Harbinger bolsters the fleet by spawning strike craft.

tech_harbingers.name: Harbingers
tech_harbingers.description: Harbingers represent a significant leap in bio-engineered warfare, blending formidable firepower with the resilience of living technology. These ships serve as the backbone of the fleet.

tech_heritage_site.name: Heritage Sites
tech_heritage_site.description: Physical reminders of how far we have come both instill a reverence for past achievements and bolster ambitions for the future.

tech_hive_cluster.name: Clustered Synapses
tech_hive_cluster.description: By clustering networks of macroscopic synaptic nodes, maximum meganeuron transmission per available surface area can be attained.

tech_hive_confluence.name: Confluence of Thought
tech_hive_confluence.description: The will of the Hive will be further strengthened and coordinated with the expansion and development of a massive nervous center of meganeurons.

tech_hive_node.name: Synaptic Structures
tech_hive_node.description: Through the development of macroscopic synaptic nodes, the will of the Hive will be strengthened.

tech_holo_entertainment.name: Holo-Entertainment
tech_holo_entertainment.description: Pioneering use of holographic technology allows for the creation of artificial environments that seem as authentic as the real world. It is the next step of immersive entertainment.

tech_holographic_rituals.name: Holographic Rituals
tech_holographic_rituals.description: Seeing is believing, and belief begets reality.

tech_housing_1.name: Weather Control Systems
tech_housing_1.description: The ability to alter a planet's weather patterns to suppress destructive weather phenomena will make residential buildings easier to maintain and open up new areas for habitation.

tech_housing_2.name: Anti-Gravity Engineering
tech_housing_2.description: With directional gravity technology, buildings on the surface of planets can reach higher than ever before without risking structural collapse. The sky is the limit!
