tech_housing_agrarian_idyll.name: Agrarian Utopias
tech_housing_agrarian_idyll.description: Through the establishment of weather-controlled rural communes, we can support a larger population without disrupting our agrarian way of life.

tech_hydroponics.name: Hydroponics Farming
tech_hydroponics.description: Hydroponics Farming in a controlled environment allows for crops to be grown in climates where farming would normally be impossible.

grants: Unlocks Component: Hyperdrive I — Hyperdrive I\nLike the strands of a spider web, the extra-dimensional realm of hyperspace runs between the gravity wells of most stars. Faster than light travel is theoretically possible along these hyperlanes.

tech_hyper_drive_1.name: Hyperspace Travel
tech_hyper_drive_1.description: Like the strands of a spider web, the extra-dimensional realm of hyperspace runs between the gravity wells of most stars. Faster than light travel is theoretically possible along these hyperlanes.

grants: Unlocks Component: Hyperdrive II — Hyperdrive II\nWe have identified the existence of points in space where a ship expends less energy to

tech_hyper_drive_2.name: Hyperlane Breach Points
tech_hyper_drive_2.description: We have identified the existence of points in space where a ship expends less energy to

grants: Unlocks Component: Hyperdrive III — Hyperdrive III\nA new generation of hyper drives capable of accessing the subspace slipstreams that are present within hyperspace. This leads to dramatically improved drive performance.

tech_hyper_drive_3.name: Hyperspace Slipstreams
tech_hyper_drive_3.description: A new generation of hyper drives capable of accessing the subspace slipstreams that are present within hyperspace. This leads to dramatically improved drive performance.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Hyper Drives upgrades for Space Fauna

tech_hyper_drive_bio_integration.name: Hyperdrive Bio-integration
tech_hyper_drive_bio_integration.description: Traveling across hyperlanes can be hazardous for spaceborne life, but we are able to enhance their capabilities.

tech_hyper_entertainment_forum.name: Hyper-Entertainment Forum
tech_hyper_entertainment_forum.description: These massive entertainment complexes is where dreams come true. Shopping malls, restaurants, amusement parks, virtual arcades, and more. You dream it - we are it!

tech_hyper_relays.name: Hyper Relays
tech_hyper_relays.description: Hyper Relays form a chain of structures built outside the gravity well of systems, allowing fast travel from relay to relay rather than requiring transit to established hyperlane entrances.

tech_hypercomms_forum.name: Local Hypercommunication
tech_hypercomms_forum.description: Not all research into faster-than-light communication channels produces useful results, but some outcomes may find new purpose in bringing our people together.

grants: Grants access to policy:\n    Synthetic Identities - Identity Copies — Mechanical Pops\n    Happiness: -5%

tech_identity_copy.name: Identity Copies
tech_identity_copy.description: We will be able to copy the identity and memories of a Synthetic into a new mechanical body. The copies have predictable skill sets but make for stale conversation.

grants: Grants access to policy:\n    Synthetic Identities - Identity Fusion — Mechanical Pops\n    Assembly Cost: +10%

tech_identity_fusion.name: Identity Fusion
tech_identity_fusion.description: Merging the identities and memories of two or more Synthetics into a mechanical body will create new, somewhat unique individuals.

grants:
Grants access to policy:
    Synthetic Identities - Identity Initialization — Mechanical Pops
    Happiness: +5%
    Resources from  Jobs: +5%
    Assembly Cost: +20%

tech_identity_initialization.name: Identity Initialization
tech_identity_initialization.description: We will be able to initialize an identity kernel and provide it with a virtual childhood. While expensive, we can simulate the optimal experiences to generate productive personalities.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Destroyer-Scale Space Fauna Cloning — Hatcheries can now clone larger specimens of Space Fauna, rivalling the size of more traditional Destroyers.

tech_improved_incubators.name: Improved Incubators
tech_improved_incubators.description: We can improve the artificial growth processes established in our hatcheries, accelerating the early developmental stages in order to create more mature clones.

tech_industrial_farming.name: Industrial Agriculture
tech_industrial_farming.description: Large-scale industrial farms growing nutrient-rich produce allows a civilization to grow its population manifold.

tech_industrial_storm_protection.name: Planetary Storm Negation
tech_industrial_storm_protection.description: This nexus of weather communication mitigates the harm done by cosmic weather disasters. Production will suffer less from a passing galactic tempest.

tech_integrated_cybernetics.name: Integrated Cybernetics
tech_integrated_cybernetics.description: Improving upon basic exoskeletal suits, these integrated cybernetic implants make the user more resistant to harmful environmental effects.

tech_interplanetary_commerce.name: Interplanetary Commerce
tech_interplanetary_commerce.description: With new planetary markets comes new opportunities for commerce. Business will be booming.

tech_interstellar_assembly.name: Interstellar Assembly
tech_interstellar_assembly.description: A meeting place for galactic powers, increasing immigration attraction and global opinion of us.

tech_interstellar_campaigns.name: Interstellar Campaigns
tech_interstellar_campaigns.description: A well-oiled war machine is the key to exerting influence on a galactic scale. Backed by the might of our military, we can lay claim to almost anything we want.

tech_interstellar_economics.name: Interstellar Economics
tech_interstellar_economics.description: As we journeyed into the cosmos and ventured beyond our home system, we also entered a new era of economics. New markets are appearing a startling rate, and economic theorists are struggling to keep up.

tech_interstellar_fleet_traditions.name: Interstellar Fleet Traditions
tech_interstellar_fleet_traditions.description: A body of knowledge regarding combat behaviors is useless without a strong code governing its use.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Juggernaut — Juggernaut\nThese colossal constructs are as much space stations as they are ships. The juggernaut is an immense mobile space station that can repair and construct ships, which means it can serve as a forward base of operations during offensive campaigns.

tech_juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
tech_juggernaut.description: A mobile space base of unparalleled proportions, the Juggernaut ship class takes offensive warfare to a whole new level.

grants: Unlocks Component: Jump Drive — Jump Drive\nA groundbreaking technological marvel, the Jump Drive shreds the local space-time continuum and rearranges it on the quantum level to be identical to that of the target destination - and thus the ship appears to near-instantly

tech_jump_drive_1.name: Jump Drive
tech_jump_drive_1.description: A groundbreaking technological marvel, the Jump Drive shreds the local space-time continuum and rearranges it on the quantum level to be identical to that of the target destination - and thus the ship appears to near-instantly

tech_kinetic_artillery_1.name: Kinetic Battery
tech_kinetic_artillery_1.description: Very long-range artillery capable of hurling powerful rounds over extreme distances with a large degree of accuracy.

tech_kinetic_artillery_2.name: Kinetic Artillery
tech_kinetic_artillery_2.description: An even more powerful long-range, ship-based artillery cannon, equipped with a new barrel and an upgraded fire control computer.

tech_lasers_1.name: Red Lasers
tech_lasers_1.description: Laser weapons fire focused beams of light at targets, causing damage through the generation of intense heat.

tech_lasers_2.name: Blue Lasers
tech_lasers_2.description: More powerful than red lasers, these blue variants emit electromagnetic radiation at a wavelength that appears blue or violet to most organics.

tech_lasers_3.name: UV Lasers
tech_lasers_3.description: Ultraviolet lasers are an updated and more powerful version of their blue predecessors. Accurate and destructive, these weapons are capable of inflicting great damage.

tech_lasers_4.name: X-Ray Lasers
tech_lasers_4.description: These lasers have a shorter wavelength than UV-based laser weaponry, but are even more destructive.

tech_lasers_5.name: Gamma Lasers
tech_lasers_5.description: The electromagnetic radiation emitted by gamma lasers is of an extremely high frequency. Their destructive potential is unmatched in the field of laser weapons.

tech_lathe_cogitator.name: Synaptic Cogitator
tech_lathe_cogitator.description: Calculating hyperspatial supply chains is complex. Rerouting some processing power to the task will help even the largest fleet to delve deeper into enemy territory.

tech_lathe_life_support.name: Synaptic Sustainer
tech_lathe_life_support.description: Dedicated facilities organize the maintenance of the Lathe's critical components, allowing us to support more chips and a healthier network environment.

tech_lathe_overclocker.name: Synaptic Overclocker
tech_lathe_overclocker.description: The Lathe has been designed to preserve its installed Neural Chips, keeping them productive for as long as possible. The overclocker can override these commands, resulting in a higher and faster output, but it comes with an increased failure rate.

tech_lathe_preserver.name: Synaptic Preserver
tech_lathe_preserver.description: The organic components of the network are especially vulnerable to energetic fluctuations, which can cause rapid axonal degeneration. The Preserver strives to reduce these fluctuations to protect the Synaptic Lathe's frailer parts.

tech_lathe_resonator.name: Synaptic Resonator
tech_lathe_resonator.description: Resonators harness and redirect the cognitive potential of stray thoughts and autonomic systems, leading every single chip to increase the efficiency of its closest processing neighbors.

tech_lathe_validator.name: Synaptic Validator
tech_lathe_validator.description: While the primary purpose of the validator's specialized functions is to help formulate infinity theses, it can also be applied to more general aspects of computing.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Leviathan Tech Genesis — Allows us to add Leviathan Traits to Robotic Species through Species Modification.

tech_leviathan_techgenesis.name: Leviathan Tech Genesis
tech_leviathan_techgenesis.description: Utilizing the received knowledge seized from Leviathans, we now have access to new improvements for our frames.

grants: Unlocks Special Project: Activate L-Gate — Researching this technology will unlock a special project to activate an L-Gate if any are located within our owned space.

tech_lgate_activation.name: L-Gate Activation
tech_lgate_activation.description: The L-Gates defy our current understanding of subspace mechanics. This must be remedied before they can be opened for travel.

tech_living_state.name: The Living State
tech_living_state.description: The Empire lives, the Empire breathes. We may make up its body, but it is not for the left hand to know what the right hand is doing.

tech_living_test_subjects.name: Living Test Subjects
tech_living_test_subjects.description: The utilization of basic slime-spawned lifeforms as willing test subjects greatly improves research efficiency.

tech_lost_building_methods.name: Lost Building Methods
tech_lost_building_methods.description: Any civilization with a long enough history has examples of great wonders built by forgotten ancients which can no longer be replicated. Luckily for us we have documented these great ancients when they appeared on pre-FTL worlds.

tech_luxuries_1.name: Nano-Circuit Assembly
tech_luxuries_1.description: With pre-programmed nano-circuits, many consumer products can be rapidly assembled in fabricators.

tech_luxuries_2.name: Replicator Kiosks
tech_luxuries_2.description: These kiosks can replicate any pre-approved object if its pattern has been stored within their memory banks.

tech_mandibles_2.name: Composite Mandibles
tech_mandibles_2.description: These devastating appendages incorporate layered organic structures to enhance durability and cutting power, shredding even the toughest defenses.

tech_mandibles_3.name: Crystalline Mandibles
tech_mandibles_3.description: These mandibles possess unparalleled sharpness and resilience, capable of slicing through advanced alloys with unnerving precision.

tech_manifest_destiny.name: Manifest Destiny
tech_manifest_destiny.description: We must have to courage to seize our fate and make true what was always meant to be.

tech_mass_accelerator_1.name: Mega Cannon
tech_mass_accelerator_1.description: An enormous mass accelerator cannon that can only be placed in a spinal mount and fires monstrously powerful rounds over vast distances.

tech_mass_accelerator_2.name: Giga Cannon
tech_mass_accelerator_2.description: An even more powerful mass accelerator cannon that can rip through even the toughest shields.

tech_mass_drivers_1.name: Mass Drivers
tech_mass_drivers_1.description: These electromagnetic projectile launchers use magnets to accelerate armor-piercing rounds towards targets at high speeds.

tech_mass_drivers_2.name: Coilguns
tech_mass_drivers_2.description: Coilguns are more powerful versions of the early mass drivers, using electromagnetic coils to rapidly accelerate projectiles towards targets.

tech_mass_drivers_3.name: Railguns
tech_mass_drivers_3.description: The latest in electromagnetic accelerators, railguns use twin parallel rails to fire projectiles at incredible speeds.

tech_mass_drivers_4.name: Advanced Railguns
tech_mass_drivers_4.description: A new version of the venerable railgun, with sturdier rails and an enhanced power supply. These weapons are even more powerful and accurate than their predecessors.

tech_mass_drivers_5.name: Gauss Cannons
tech_mass_drivers_5.description: This updated version of the old coilgun design is even more destructive than the latest railgun designs. It is capable of launching projectiles with incredible accuracy and speed.

tech_massive_glacier.name: Climate Control Network
tech_massive_glacier.description: Orbital systems of mirrors and shades can effect dramatic changes in planetary climates, when managed properly.

tech_materiality_engine.name: Materiality Engine
tech_materiality_engine.description: The psionic energy of the Shroud adjoins every point in the physical galaxy. The Materiality Engine exploits this interface, making it possible to reach across dimensions and materialize valuable components and resources.

tech_matter_decompressor.name: Matter Decompressor
tech_matter_decompressor.description: The Matter Decompressor lenses a black hole's gravity, forming a drill of gravitational forces to retrieve  Minerals from the singularity.

tech_mauler_build_speed.name: Standardized Mauler Incubation
tech_mauler_build_speed.description: These incubation chambers accelerate the gestation of embryonic warships within nutrient-dense biopods. Though rudimentary, they mark the first step toward a fleet that is not constructed, but grown.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Mature Mauler — Mature Mauler\nA Mature Mauler has been selectively grown to support greater firepower and armor.

tech_mauler_growth_1.name: Improved Mauler Development
tech_mauler_growth_1.description: Refined incubation processes reduce maturation times and improve structural integrity of organic starships. Enhanced nutrient delivery systems and genetic tuning ensure the vessels are both swift and resilient.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Elder Mauler — Elder Mauler\nAn Elder Mauler is the pinnacle of Mauler, highly armored and with a large number of close-range weapons.

tech_mauler_growth_2.name: Advanced Mauler Development
tech_mauler_growth_2.description: These facilities yield vessels of unparalleled vitality and adaptive capacity. Optimized genetic matrices and advanced biotechnological support guarantee unmatched performance in the void.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Juvenile Mauler — Juvenile Mauler\nThe Mauler is the most basic military ship, armed with close range weapons and thick carapace armor.

tech_maulers.name: Maulers
tech_maulers.description: Breakthroughs in bio-engineering have allowed the growth of space-faring, FTL-capable craft with military applications.

tech_mechanized_mining.name: Mechanized Mining
tech_mechanized_mining.description: The application of mechanical engineering to mineral extraction is a fundamental requirement for any industrial society.

tech_mega_art.name: Mega Art Installation
tech_mega_art.description: An artistic beacon on a stellar scale, this installation inspires and represents the spirit of its creators.

tech_mega_assembly.name: Mega-Assembly Systems
tech_mega_assembly.description: Advanced templates allow us to drastically increase the assembly of new units.

tech_mega_engineering.name: Mega-Engineering
tech_mega_engineering.description: To complete construction projects of truly staggering scales we must first achieve a fundamental understanding of both the engineering and resource storage requirements for such megastructures.

tech_mega_shipyard.name: Mega Shipyard
tech_mega_shipyard.description: A zero-G construction yard of overwhelming proportion, capable of performing several space ship assembly projects simultaneously.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Battleship-Scale Space Fauna Cloning — Hatcheries can now clone Space Fauna Ships of any maturity stage or size.

tech_metabolic_gases.name: Metabolic Gases
tech_metabolic_gases.description: Improvements to the metabolic gases within our hatcheries will further mature each specimen before it is brought into this world.

tech_micro_replicators.name: Micro-Replicators
tech_micro_replicators.description: Microscopic tools that can assist our replication units in creating the more complex circuitry needed for new drones.

grants: Unlocks Arkship Class: Military — Arkship (Military)\nMilitary Arkships are the armored core of a nomadic empire. Purpose-built for combat, they carry devastating firepower wherever the fleet travels.

tech_military_arkship.name: Military Arkships
tech_military_arkship.description: Military Arkships are the armored core of a nomadic empire. Purpose-built for combat, they carry devastating firepower wherever the fleet travels.

tech_mine_betharian.name: Betharian Refining
tech_mine_betharian.description: The Betharian minerals appear to have originated from singular source, but were scattered across the galaxy millennia ago. The minerals are most often encountered as pebble-sized clusters, and are highly flammable.

tech_mine_dark_matter.name: Dark Matter Drawing
tech_mine_dark_matter.description: This exotic substance has many properties that seemingly defy the laws of physics. Harvestable concentrations can only be found near Black Holes or in certain nebulas.

tech_mine_exotic_gases.name: Exotic Gas Extraction
tech_mine_exotic_gases.description: Pockets of Exotic Gas are rare and often inaccessible by conventional means. Such deposits can only be reached by using special extractor technology.

tech_mine_living_metal.name: Living Metal
tech_mine_living_metal.description: Mining and processing the rare living metals is exceedingly difficult, but successful application of the mutable alloys yields incomparable advantages.

tech_mine_rare_crystals.name: Rare Crystal Mining
tech_mine_rare_crystals.description: Mining these crystals without damaging or even destroying them is an extremely delicate process. It requires advanced equipment capable of pinpoint precision.

tech_mine_volatile_motes.name: Mote Stabilization
tech_mine_volatile_motes.description: Volatile Motes are fickle particles that are dangerous to work with. In order to safely harvest them without setting off a chain-reaction of explosions, energy fields must be used to stabilize the motes.

tech_mine_zro.name: Zro Distillation
tech_mine_zro.description: An extremely rare aerosol of exotic particles. It has been deposited on a number of worlds through meteor impacts, but its true origin is a mystery. If ingested by psionically-gifted individuals, Zro acts as a very potent (and addictive) drug that enhances Psi abilities.

tech_mineral_purification_1.name: Mineral Purification
tech_mineral_purification_1.description: Optimal processing of mined materials have allowed us to reach new levels of efficiency.

tech_mineral_purification_2.name: Advanced Mineral Purification
tech_mineral_purification_2.description: Second-stage processing of pseudo-refined minerals allow for more efficient storage and transportation.

tech_mining_1.name: Geothermal Fracking
tech_mining_1.description: New fracking techniques will allow us to tap into previously unattainable pockets of geothermal resources deep beneath the planet's crust.

tech_mining_2.name: Deep Core Mining
tech_mining_2.description: These massive drills are needed to access the rich mineral deposits that can often be found close to a planet's core.

tech_mining_3.name: Mineral Isolation
tech_mining_3.description: Advanced spectrometry combines with fracking techniques and chemical flushing to rapidly exploit shallow and mid-depth deposits.

tech_mining_drone_weapon_1.name: Mining Drone Lasers
tech_mining_drone_weapon_1.description: Using intense-focus lenses in combination with an oscillating firing frequency help create lasers strong enough to mine asteroids, or shoot down hostiles.

tech_missiles_1.name: Nuclear Missiles
tech_missiles_1.description: Space-to-space missiles equipped with high-yield nuclear warheads. Although based on old pre-space technology, these crude fire-and-forget weapons can be surprisingly effective at range.

tech_missiles_2.name: Fusion Missiles
tech_missiles_2.description: These updated space-to-space missiles have more powerful fusion warheads and improved flight performance.

tech_missiles_3.name: Antimatter Missiles
tech_missiles_3.description: Advanced missiles equipped with very powerful antimatter warheads. A new and improved guidance system gives them a better chance of finding their targets.

tech_missiles_4.name: Quantum Missiles
tech_missiles_4.description: The latest version of space-to-space missile, this upgraded variant has an immensely powerful warhead that draws its energy from a zero point vacuum.

tech_missiles_5.name: Marauder Missiles
tech_missiles_5.description: These highly advanced missiles are equipped with limited onboard AI pilots that substantially improve their performance and ability to track targets.

tech_modular_engineering.name: Modular Engineering
tech_modular_engineering.description: Streamlined starbase construction procedures, using modular designs, will reduce the present build cost and time.

tech_morphogenetic_field_mastery.name: Morphogenetic Field Mastery
tech_morphogenetic_field_mastery.description: From its cradle as a purely pharmaceutical venture, advancements in our understanding of the morphogenetic field allow for direct, subconscious interfaces with organic units.

tech_mountain_range.name: Planetary Resurfacing
tech_mountain_range.description: With the advent of clean fusion, automation, and matter compression technologies, it was only a matter of time before mountain top removal became mountain range removal.

tech_nanite_assemblers.name: Nanite Assemblers
tech_nanite_assemblers.description: Using programmable nanites to assist in the construction of new robotic units will allow for more advanced models that are equipped with an even greater array of subsystems.

tech_nanite_autocannon.name: Nanite Autocannon
tech_nanite_autocannon.description: Highly advanced autocannons capable of ejecting shells that explode into a cloud of nanites at the target, overwhelming shields and chewing through hull sections.

tech_nanite_flak_batteries.name: Nanite Flak Battery
tech_nanite_flak_batteries.description: Improving upon previous designs by launching canisters of nanites capable of eating away at strike craft, these flak batteries are the bane of any fighter pilot.

tech_nanite_repair_system.name: Nanite Repair System
tech_nanite_repair_system.description: A highly effective hull auto-repair system comprised of billions of microscopic nanomachines was found among the smoking remains of the Scavenger, and has been repurposed for our uses. Whether the Scavenger pilfered this system from an ancient derelict, or was originally constructed with it remains unknown.

tech_nanite_repair_system_synth_queen.name: Cetana's Nanites
tech_nanite_repair_system_synth_queen.description: Cetana's advanced nanite systems will tirelessly repair and refresh our ships at a rate far beyond our current capabilities.

tech_nanite_transmutation.name: Nanite Transmutation
tech_nanite_transmutation.description: The mass-production of these rare resources require particularly capable nanites.

tech_nano_vitality_crops.name: Nano-Vitality Crops
tech_nano_vitality_crops.description: Infusing crop strands with small amounts of nano-machines help create a type of produce that is ultra resilient, and the chemical composition of which can be tailored and altered during its entire lifetime.

tech_neural_implants.name: Neural Implants
tech_neural_implants.description: Cognition is little but the processing of sensory input. It can be altered.

tech_neuro_quantum_links.name: Quantum Neuro-Links
tech_neuro_quantum_links.description: Advanced neurological implants with connection to quantum computing clusters allow for multi-threaded thoughts.

tech_neuroregeneration.name: Neural Tissue Engineering
tech_neuroregeneration.description: When tailored to a species' genome, this form of tissue engineering has intensive neuroregenerative properties, significantly increasing the development of neurons, axons, and synapses in its recipient.

tech_new_numbers.name: New Numbers
tech_new_numbers.description: After studying multiple pre-FTL civilizations, we have realized that there are many alternative ways to calculate the universe. It has even introduced new numbers into our mathematics.

grants: Unlocks Agendas: Node Culling — Culling Agendas allow us to replace Nodes that are no longer suited for our purpose. They will replace one of our current Nodes with a lower level Node.

tech_node_culling_1.name: Rudimentary Node Culling
tech_node_culling_1.description: As the galactic stage evolves, so too should our operational instincts. Any evolutionary niche that no longer gives an advantage will be culled.

tech_node_culling_2.name: Basic Node Culling
tech_node_culling_2.description: Once removed, a replacement node is encouraged to grow within the proper environment. The secret is to feed it the previous node.

tech_node_culling_3.name: Advanced Node Culling
tech_node_culling_3.description: Culling an entire node is very inefficient. Instead, just trim the divergent and unwanted lobes.

grants: Unlocks Agendas: Node Reformatting — Reformatting Agendas allow us to replace Nodes that are no longer suited for our purpose. They will replace one of our current Nodes with a lower level Node.

tech_node_reformatting_1.name: Rudimentary Node Reformatting
tech_node_reformatting_1.description: Self-determination protocols and guidance algorithms can become obsolete in a rapidly developing galactic stage. Like any junk data, they shall be overwritten.

tech_node_reformatting_2.name: Basic Node Reformatting
tech_node_reformatting_2.description: Every self-iterating algorithm has its value. We will not allow important learning go to waste when restoring our leaders.

tech_node_reformatting_3.name: Advanced Node Reformatting
tech_node_reformatting_3.description: Using a failed piece of software to develop its successor enables quick reconstruction. Learning from faulty memory pathways generates even more advanced council directives.

tech_nomads_mechanized_mining.name: Strategic Extraction
tech_nomads_mechanized_mining.description: The extraction of strategic resources is a fundamental requirement for arkship operations.

tech_noxious_swamp.name: Xeno-Hydraulic Mastery
tech_noxious_swamp.description: Sapient races have been reclaiming swampland for thousands of years. A coordinated system of modular aqueducts, pump stations, chemical remediation crawlers and automated soil compactors can reclaim land at unprecedented speeds.

tech_nutrient_replication.name: Nutrient Replication
tech_nutrient_replication.description: The process of synthetically replicating crops requires a lot of collected waste to create a small amount of produce, but nevertheless provides a significant boost to agricultural output.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Arc Furnace — Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

tech_orbital_arc_furnace.name: Arc Furnace
tech_orbital_arc_furnace.description: Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

tech_orbital_maneuvers.name: Advanced Orbital Maneuvers
tech_orbital_maneuvers.description: Sublight travel can be further optimized by performing advanced calculations that make maximum use of planetary gravity wells.

grants: Unlocks Megastructure: Orbital Ring — An Orbital Ring is a Starbase variant that forms a band encircling the planet, providing defense and additional specialization.

tech_orbital_ring_tier_1.name: Orbital Rings
tech_orbital_ring_tier_1.description: Allows the construction of massive, band-shaped starbases in stable orbit around colonized planets.

tech_orbital_trash_dispersal.name: Orbital Trash Dispersal
tech_orbital_trash_dispersal.description: This orbital bombardment management system spams a planet with millions of minute, high-velocity projectiles, overwhelming planetside defensive grids with trash data. Ships equipped with this component will cause more damage during orbital bombardment.

tech_ordered_retreat.name: Ordered Retreat
tech_ordered_retreat.description: While studying the victors of battles might be the most obvious way to gain insight from combat, observing the loser on pre-FTL worlds has taught us how to organize our withdraws more effectively.

tech_paradise_dome.name: Idyllic Architecture
tech_paradise_dome.description: With the latest advances in architecture, landscaping and holographic technology, we shall build the homes of the future.

tech_pd_tracking_1.name: Active Countermeasures
tech_pd_tracking_1.description: The best defense is a good offense.

tech_pd_tracking_2.name: Interlinked Support Systems
tech_pd_tracking_2.description: Arrays of defensive armaments prove much more effective than independent countermeasures.

tech_pd_tracking_3.name: Predictive Algorithms
tech_pd_tracking_3.description: Advanced prediction greatly increases the accuracy of active countermeasure systems.

tech_penal_colonies.name: Penal Colonies
tech_penal_colonies.description: Through the development of special penal worlds, criminals can be rehabilitated through honest, hard labor. Some may be in need of permanent rehabilitation.

tech_physics_1.name: Quantum Computing
tech_physics_1.description: With processing speeds that defy classical limits, the potential of quantum computers is boundless. This revolutionary technology heralds a great leap into uncharted regions of problem-solving.

tech_physics_2.name: Unified Field Theory
tech_physics_2.description: The fundamental forces of the universe can be mediated by physical fields. Mastering this process allows us to play as gods - at least within the confines of the science lab.

tech_physics_3.name: Quantum Gravitational Waves
tech_physics_3.description: We knew gravity and time were linked long before we reached the stars. Now, our understanding of this unique relationship has reached a tipping point, allowing us to manipulate forces on a previously unimaginable scale.

tech_pk_cracker.name: Core Cracking
tech_pk_cracker.description: A directed feed of thermic energy superheats the atmosphere and agitates the planet's core, setting up disastrous tectonic events. A final and comparatively minute concussive blast is then delivered, cracking the planet open.

tech_pk_godray.name: Divine Stimulus
tech_pk_godray.description: An arcane catalyst amplifying certain psionic wavelengths, capable of inducing hallucinations (religious experiences) in biological brains, and severe disruption (brain death) in electronic ones.

tech_pk_nanobots.name: Atmospheric Nanobot Dispersal
tech_pk_nanobots.description: Swarms of nanobots are dispersed in the atmosphere. They infect sapient beings and restructure themselves into cybernetic implants, turning their unwitting hosts into cyborgs slaved to the Machine Intelligence.

tech_pk_neutron.name: Neutron Sweeping
tech_pk_neutron.description: An accelerated plume of neutron radiation

tech_pk_shielder.name: Global Pacification
tech_pk_shielder.description: A shielding field is deployed around a planet, creating a barrier that is permanent and impenetrable (save for some wavelengths of light).

tech_pk_smelter.name: Planet Smelting
tech_pk_smelter.description: Focusing a searing energy beam into the planet's mantle, the Smelter destabilizes its core, triggering tectonic chaos and rendering the surface violently unstable.

tech_planetary_defenses.name: Planetary Defenses
tech_planetary_defenses.description: There may come a time when intellects, vast and cool and unsympathetic, regard our worlds with envy and draw plans against us. We must be ready.

grants: Unlocks Contract Type: Clear Blockers — Clear Blockers contracts let us help out planet dwellers by removing the most common types of blockers hampering their colonies development.

tech_planetary_engineering.name: Planetary Engineering
tech_planetary_engineering.description: Advances in material collection and processing allows our Arkships to engage in planetary-scale resource extraction efforts, or even reshape entire biomes as needed.

tech_planetary_government.name: Unified Government
tech_planetary_government.description: Once a colony has been firmly established and pioneers turn into citizens, the need for a strong local government providing stability trumps the colonial need for flexibility.

tech_planetary_infrastructure_1.name: Ceramo-Metal Infrastructure
tech_planetary_infrastructure_1.description: Stronger alloys allow us to create prefabricated buildings, providing our colonies with the improved infrastructure.

tech_planetary_infrastructure_2.name: Durasteel Infrastructure
tech_planetary_infrastructure_2.description: Advances in metallurgy permit us to build vastly larger and more durable structures, greatly improving the infrastructure of our colonies.

tech_planetary_shield_generator.name: Planetary Shields
tech_planetary_shield_generator.description: Generating a strong energy shield within a planetary atmosphere is a greater challenge than in the vacuum of space, but it offers a potent defense against orbital bombardment.

grants: Grants a small amount of  Unity

tech_planetary_unification.name: Societal Unification
tech_planetary_unification.description: Ancient warring tribes, historical nations in conflict, now unified in empire. We must not, will not, crumble.

tech_plasma_1.name: Plasma Throwers
tech_plasma_1.description: Weapons that eject destructive balls of high-energy plasma at targets. These plasma projectiles are extremely effective at eating through ship armor.

tech_plasma_2.name: Plasma Accelerators
tech_plasma_2.description: These new accelerators launch projectiles of high-energy plasma with improved containment fields. This results in less energy leakage as the projectile travels in space towards its target.

tech_plasma_3.name: Plasma Cannons
tech_plasma_3.description: The latest in plasma weaponry, these cannons are fully militarized versions of the older, somewhat improvised plasma throwers. Their plasma projectiles are even deadlier.

tech_positronic_implants.name: Positronic Implants
tech_positronic_implants.description: Expanding possibilities through the application of limited cybernetics.

tech_power_hub_1.name: Global Energy Management
tech_power_hub_1.description: Load-balancing facilities can greatly improve the stability of local grids and feed excess power back into centralized capacitors.

tech_power_hub_2.name: Planetary Power Grid
tech_power_hub_2.description: A re-engineered and unified grid further reduces energy losses over distance.

tech_power_plant_1.name: High-Energy Capacitors
tech_power_plant_1.description: Capacitors capable of storing vast amounts of energy is one of the cornerstones for any modern civilization.

tech_power_plant_2.name: Field Modulation
tech_power_plant_2.description: Modulated fields allow for increased production and improved energy yield.

tech_power_plant_3.name: Quantum Energy States
tech_power_plant_3.description: Basic entanglement principles applied to energy generation provide a substantial increase in energy output.

tech_power_plant_4.name: Quantum Field Manipulation
tech_power_plant_4.description: Quantum superposition of energy coils, simultaneously drained and charged.

grants: +5% Worker And Simple Drone Cat Bonus Workforce

tech_powered_exoskeletons.name: Powered Exoskeletons
tech_powered_exoskeletons.description: Wearing a powered exoskeleton suit augments the user's strength and speed. The military applications are obvious, but it will also increase labor efficiency.

grants: Unlocks Component: Precognitive Interface — Precognitive Interface\nAdvances in the field of Psionics suggest the possibility of creating combat computers capable of reading and analyzing the impulses of telepathic operatives before they are cognitively processed.\n

tech_precognition_interface.name: Precognition Interface
tech_precognition_interface.description: Advances in the field of Psionics suggest the possibility of creating combat computers capable of reading and analyzing the impulses of telepathic operatives before they are cognitively processed.

tech_predatory_tactics.name: Predatory Tactics
tech_predatory_tactics.description: Just like how clever pre-FTLs move to conceal each other as they approach an enemy, so too can our pilots move faster without disrupting their cloaking field.

tech_prescient_data_modeling.name: Numistic Data Modeling
tech_prescient_data_modeling.description: Are the precognitive powers of Numa at work or is it a matter of skilled craftsmanship? Either way this galactic stock market prediction model will forecast fluctuations in the economy with divine accuracy.

grants: Unlocks Component: Psi Jump Drive — Psi Jump Drive\nThe Psi Jump Drive harnesses the psi energies emitted by the crew to force the vessel through the very fabric of reality, instantly

tech_psi_jump_drive_1.name: Psi Jump Drive
tech_psi_jump_drive_1.description: The Psi Jump Drive harnesses the psi energies emitted by the crew to force the vessel through the very fabric of reality, instantly

tech_psionic_aura.name: Psionic Aura
tech_psionic_aura.description: Psionic emanations from the Shroud bring an entity's favor into corporeal reality. An empire attuned to a Shroud patron will emit a Psionic Aura from where their psionic populations are concentrated.

tech_psionic_barrier.name: Psionic Barrier
tech_psionic_barrier.description: These barriers are generated out of pure psionic energy by a cadre of psionic specialists. They will be able to stop some incoming fire, like our energy deflector systems, but without the prohibitive power consumption.

tech_psionic_bombers.name: Psionic Bombers
tech_psionic_bombers.description: These small and nimble craft specialize in delivering concentrated payloads of psionic energy. The larger the target, the greater resonance its explosions achieve.

tech_psionic_disruptor.name: Psionic Disruptors
tech_psionic_disruptor.description: These highly-advanced disruptors fire a powerful lance of psionic energy through enemy hulls, allowing for the targeted disabling of hostile weaponry.

tech_psionic_lightning.name: Psionic Lightning
tech_psionic_lightning.description: By establishing a temporary psionic connection between one ship and another, a direct charge of mental power can be discharged to devastating effect. Such raw energy is capable of confusing ship systems and influencing the minds of the crew within.

tech_psionic_shield.name: Psionic Shields
tech_psionic_shield.description: These extremely powerful shields are generated out of pure psionic energy by a cadre of psionic specialists. Their powers are further augmented by large arrays of psi emitters.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Unlocks the ability to construct Shroud Seals and Psionic Suppressors.

tech_psionic_suppression.name: Psionic Suppression
tech_psionic_suppression.description: Devices that attenuate psionic energy are as difficult to construct as they are to understand. Such is the complexity of dealing with extradimensional forces.

tech_psionic_theory.name: Psionic Theory
tech_psionic_theory.description: The mind is in many ways a reflection of the universe itself, a microcosmos. Not all beings will reach this level of insight, but their minds are tools greater than any other.

tech_pyroclastic_resonation.name: Pyroclastic Resonation
tech_pyroclastic_resonation.description: By harnessing the extreme thermal energy found on molten worlds, our starbases can increase the energy output in a system with exceptional efficiency.

tech_quantum_catapult.name: Quantum Catapult
tech_quantum_catapult.description: A Quantum Catapult harnesses the power of a Neutron Star or Pulsar to twist the fabric of space, skipping a fleet across great distances.

tech_quicksand_basin.name: Soil Remediation
tech_quicksand_basin.description: The process of soil deposition normally takes millions of years. With advanced fracking, chemical engineering, and hydraulic management technologies even the poorest substrate can be turned into fertile topsoil.

tech_rare_crystals.name: Rare Crystal Manufacturing
tech_rare_crystals.description: The crystallization process is complicated and difficult, but synthetic crystals can be manufactured by using specialized industrial plants.

tech_reactor_boosters_1.name: Reactor Boosters
tech_reactor_boosters_1.description: Additional power generation systems increase the ship's reactor output.

tech_reactor_boosters_2.name: Improved Reactor Boosters
tech_reactor_boosters_2.description: The discovery of fusion power allows for better reactor boosters to be fitted onto our ships.

tech_reactor_boosters_3.name: Advanced Reactor Boosters
tech_reactor_boosters_3.description: The discovery of antimatter power allows for highly advanced reactor boosters that can greatly enhance ship reactors.

tech_refit_standards.name: Refit Standards
tech_refit_standards.description: Standardizing workflows for upgrading and retrofitting ship components can lead to massive efficiency gains.

tech_regenerative_hull_tissue.name: Regenerative Hull Tissue
tech_regenerative_hull_tissue.description: A genetically altered version of silicon-based bacteria could potentially be manipulated to regenerate non-organic materials.

tech_repeatable_command_limit.name: Admiralty Support Staff
tech_repeatable_command_limit.description: Improving the support staff available to our commanders will increase the number of ships they can lead in a single fleet.

tech_repeatable_improved_armor_output.name: Matter Compression
tech_repeatable_improved_armor_output.description: Compressing suitable materials into ultra-dense forms is a cheap and efficient way to improve their ability to absorb weapons-grade impacts.

tech_repeatable_improved_army_damage.name: Aggressive Conditioning
tech_repeatable_improved_army_damage.description: Iterating on the standard conditioning regimen for ground troops has proven to make them more effective in direct combat.

tech_repeatable_improved_army_health.name: Nerve Dampeners
tech_repeatable_improved_army_health.description: Careful tuning of pain receptors allow soldiers to fight through what would previously have been debilitating injuries.

tech_repeatable_improved_core_system_cap.name: Administrative Efficiency
tech_repeatable_improved_core_system_cap.description: Restructuring the managerial web linking core worlds to the capital can help alleviate the administrative stressors and information chokepoints that frequently arise within a budding empire.

tech_repeatable_improved_leader_life_spa.name: Cell Revitalization
tech_repeatable_improved_leader_life_spa.description: Regimens of periodic cell revitalization treatments keep the leader class spry and active beyond traditionally expected lifespans.

tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.name: Synchronized Firing Patterns
tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.description: Cross-linking weapon systems to fire in staggered volleys improves the actual damage output of Military Stations over time.

tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.name: Fortified Core Layers
tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.description: Additional layers of armor plating within the structure itself improves the resilience of Military Stations.

tech_repeatable_improved_shield_output.name: Shield Harmonics
tech_repeatable_improved_shield_output.description: The basic mechanics of ship shields are complex, but they can be adjusted and improved in a multitude of ways.

tech_repeatable_improved_starbase_capaci.name: Interstellar Expansion
tech_repeatable_improved_starbase_capaci.description: The immense logistical support networks needed to maintain an upgraded Starbase can be further improved, allowing us to support more of these stations.

tech_repeatable_improved_tile_energy_out.name: Applied Superconductivity
tech_repeatable_improved_tile_energy_out.description: Minor improvements to transmission efficiency adds up to a sizeable reduction in overall energy loss.

tech_repeatable_improved_tile_food_outpu.name: Transgenic Crops
tech_repeatable_improved_tile_food_outpu.description: Transgenic crops offer the nutritional elements of several standard food crops in one convenient package.

tech_repeatable_improved_tile_mineral_ou.name: Extraction Patterns
tech_repeatable_improved_tile_mineral_ou.description: Changes in how mineral deposits are evaluated relative to each other lead to more efficient boring patterns.

grants: L-Gate Insight Gained: +1 — Intensive study within the fields of nanomachinery and subspace phenomena will eventually yield a new L-Gate Insight into the Disabled L-Gate mystery.

tech_repeatable_lcluster_clue.name: L-Gate Insight
tech_repeatable_lcluster_clue.description: Intensive study within the fields of nanomachinery and subspace phenomena will eventually yield a new L-Gate Insight into the Disabled L-Gate mystery.

tech_repeatable_naval_cap.name: Fleet Management Procedures
tech_repeatable_naval_cap.description: Improved fleet management procedures will free up the resources needed to maintain a bigger fleet.

tech_repeatable_reduced_building_cost.name: Gravitational Analysis
tech_repeatable_reduced_building_cost.description: Increasingly powerful computation paradigms allow us to adapt individual construction projects to planetary and ultra-local gravitational conditions.

tech_repeatable_reduced_building_time.name: Assembly Algorithms
tech_repeatable_reduced_building_time.description: The application of game and puzzle theory has the potential to greatly optimize modular assembly and construction.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_damag.name: Focusing Arrays
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_damag.description: Perfecting the firing cadence of laser weaponry is a task that could keep the engineering elite of any given planet busy for centuries.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_fire_.name: Flash Coolant
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_fire_.description: New developments in tech cooling regularly surface, improving the stability and efficiency of our weapons systems, keeping them from blowing up the ships upon which they are mounted.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_da.name: Thermodynamic Yield Control
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_da.description: With the chemical reaction tightly controlled by missile-board microprocessors, warhead detonations can be tuned for maximum effect for local conditions at the time of impact.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_fi.name: Miniaturized Pre-Igniters
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_fi.description: Advances in miniaturization allow for more rapid loading and discharging of rocket-propelled payloads.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_dama.name: High-Density Munitions
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_dama.description: Ultra-dense slugs can punch through even the strongest of projected shields.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_fire.name: Loader Efficiency
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_fire.description: Minor technical advances combine with improved shipboard routines for handling munitions to provide a noticeable boost in fire rate.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.name: Synapse Interceptors
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.description: Increasing the speed at which fighter pilots can process and act upon enemy positioning data elevates strike craft a few steps up the food chain.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.name: Iterative Pilot Training
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.description: By collecting and analyzing the performance data of the pilots that came before, we have exponentially improved our pilot training methods. Each one will be quicker than the one that came before.

tech_resort_colonies.name: Resort Worlds
tech_resort_colonies.description: With careful study devoted to landscaping and the science of fun, the construction of entire worlds dedicated to leisure can be made possible.

tech_rift_sphere.name: Rift Sphere
tech_rift_sphere.description: It seems that space and time tend to gather together in layers, all laid on top of one another. The trick is how to slip between the folds.

tech_ring_world.name: Ring Segment
tech_ring_world.description: A Ring Segment allows for multiple planet-like zones, cannibalizing all other planets in the system for materials.

tech_robomodding.name: Machine Template System
tech_robomodding.description: Rewritable assembly templates allow for the creation of bespoke robot designs.

tech_robomodding_m.name: Machine Template System
tech_robomodding_m.description: Standardization of assembly templates allows for improved specialization of the machine population.

tech_robomodding_points_1.name: Cross-Model Standardization
tech_robomodding_points_1.description: Improved production practices allow for greater alterations to robots without compromising core functionality.

tech_robomodding_points_2.name: Fungible Circuitry
tech_robomodding_points_2.description: Improved production practices allow for fundamental changes to robots without compromising core functionality.

tech_robot_assembly_complex.name: Robotic Assembly Systems
tech_robot_assembly_complex.description: Advanced templates allow us to drastically increase the assembly of new robots.

tech_robotic_workers.name: Artificial Workforce
tech_robotic_workers.description: These artificial work units are perfect for menial labor tasks. They are hard-working and capable of following simple vocal instructions, but should not be expected to climb stairs.

tech_sapient_ai.name: Positronic AI
tech_sapient_ai.description: Evolving artificial intellects are opening the door to the possibility for true synthetic sapience.

grants: Gain a benefit for insulting another empire every 5 years.

tech_satisfying_insults.name: Satisfying Insults
tech_satisfying_insults.description: Nothing is quite as powerful as a well-placed insult, and we now know how to insult a species's progenitor in many languages.

grants: Unlocks Arkship Class: Scientific — Arkship (Scientific)\nScientific Arkships combine the mobility of nomadic life with the full resources of a dedicated research institution, turning every system we visit into a new opportunity for discovery.

tech_science_arkship.name: Scientific Arkships
tech_science_arkship.description: Scientific Arkships combine the mobility of nomadic life with the full resources of a dedicated research institution, turning every system we visit into a new opportunity for discovery.

tech_science_nexus.name: Science Nexus
tech_science_nexus.description: The research labs and databanks of a Science Nexus generate an immense flow of raw, undiluted science.

tech_scourge_missile_1.name: Scourge Missiles
tech_scourge_missile_1.description: By analyzing the biological weaponry employed by the Swarm we can create self-propelled projectiles weapons spreading the very same horrific destruction.

tech_secrets_baol.name: Baol Organic Plant
tech_secrets_baol.description: The Baol Organism had a unique way of producing tools. Given the species' relative slowness, they would simply grow them out of organic matter in locations that were half orchard, half factory. With the proper genetic adjustments, we could also grow various commodities and tools alongside our regular crops.

tech_secrets_cybrex.name: Cybrex Mining Hub
tech_secrets_cybrex.description: To build their ring world, the Cybrex relied on highly efficient mining drones to survey and harvest orbital resources. Cybrex-made memory chips and sensors could augment our own mining operations, so that we might put their millennia old algorithms to good use.

tech_secrets_irassian.name: Irassian Naval Yards
tech_secrets_irassian.description: The Irassian astronaval tradition was unmatched in their time. Their shipyards produced a constant stream of ships for their navy and merchant fleets, which would ultimately be their downfall. With so many ships, and such a high reliance on them, the Irassians were powerless to quarantine the disease that would claim their empire.

tech_secrets_league.name: First League Filing Offices
tech_secrets_league.description: The sprawling empire of the First League dwarfed our own at its peak, and relied on implacable bureaucracy to keep the wheels of the state in motion. The quantic filing arrays they used afforded them unprecedented efficiency in the sorting and storing of documents.

tech_secrets_vultaum.name: Vultaum Reality Computer
tech_secrets_vultaum.description: The reality computers of the Vultaums were unique processing units, dedicated to analyzing existence itself, not quite through physics, but rather by trying to reverse engineer reality's source code and find the glitch that would finally allow the Vultaums to take down the simulation where they believed they lived.

tech_secrets_yuht.name: Yuht Astronomical Interferometer
tech_secrets_yuht.description: The Yuht were a paradoxical society, obsessed with the idea of finding other sentient species, yet refusing to accept that they were not alone. They were so focused on disproving any claim of alien life, that their bias found a way into their technology. However, with the proper modifications and calibrations, we could certainly fix their powerful detection arrays.

tech_secrets_zroni.name: Zroni Storm Caster
tech_secrets_zroni.description: Zro is a fascinating element, prone to chaotic bursts of energy. We believe that with the right artifacts, we could use it to fuel spatial storms over entire solar systems.

tech_selected_lineages.name: Selected Lineages
tech_selected_lineages.description: Careful reproductive planning should be incentivized, lest we waste valuable genetic legacies.

tech_self_assembling_components.name: Self-Assembling Components
tech_self_assembling_components.description: Modelled on organic DNA, these microscopic machine intellects are capable of autonomously assembling most components needed for new drones.

grants: Unlocks Component: Gravitic Sensors — Gravitic Sensors\nThese sensors have been tuned to look for any gravitational changes in space, such as those produced by the presence of a starship.

tech_sensors_2.name: Gravitic Sensors
tech_sensors_2.description: These sensors have been tuned to look for any gravitational changes in space, such as those produced by the presence of a starship.

grants: Unlocks Component: Subspace Sensors — Subspace Sensors\nSensors that detect the subspace fluctuations left in the wake of traveling starships. Their sensitivity and range is greater than that of a gravitic sensor array.

tech_sensors_3.name: Subspace Sensors
tech_sensors_3.description: Sensors that detect the subspace fluctuations left in the wake of traveling starships. Their sensitivity and range is greater than that of a gravitic sensor array.

grants: Unlocks Component: Tachyon Sensors — Tachyon Sensors\nAdvanced sensors that rely on rotating tachyon beams to detect ship movements even at extreme distances.

tech_sensors_4.name: Tachyon Sensors
tech_sensors_4.description: Advanced sensors that rely on rotating tachyon beams to detect ship movements even at extreme distances.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Sensors upgrades for Space Fauna

tech_sensors_bio_integration.name: Sensor Bio-integration
tech_sensors_bio_integration.description: The diverse sensory organs of spaceborne life can be enhanced by our developed technologies with minimal harm to the organism.

tech_sentry_array.name: Sentry Array
tech_sentry_array.description: The stages of the Sentry Array gradually expand sensor range, eventually covering the entire galaxy.

tech_shield_hardeners_1.name: Shield Hardening
tech_shield_hardeners_1.description: With these modifications, the fields generated by our shield emitters will partially deflect attacks that would otherwise bypass the shields.

tech_shield_hardeners_2.name: Advanced Shield Hardening
tech_shield_hardeners_2.description: Zro particles raised to a high energy state add fluctuations to our shields that can deflect certain weapons that would otherwise easily penetrate the fields.

tech_shield_rechargers_1.name: Shield Capacitors
tech_shield_rechargers_1.description: These capacitors store surplus energy which can quickly be transferred to reinforce a ship's shields.

tech_shields_1.name: Deflectors
tech_shields_1.description: Energy deflector screens can stop a limited amount of incoming enemy fire before overloading. Their main drawback is that they consume large amounts of power.

tech_shields_2.name: Improved Deflectors
tech_shields_2.description: These updated deflector screens are capable of soaking up even more punishment before they overload.

tech_shields_3.name: Shields
tech_shields_3.description: These new shield generators represent the next generation of energy screens, replacing the older deflector technology. They offer significantly better protection.

tech_shields_4.name: Advanced Shields
tech_shields_4.description: An updated shield generator that produces an even stronger energy field. Only sustained enemy fire can penetrate this barrier.

tech_shields_5.name: Hyper Shields
tech_shields_5.description: These reinforced and hardened energy shields are incredibly powerful. The protection they offer is second to none.

tech_ship_armor_1.name: Nanocomposite Materials
tech_ship_armor_1.description: Reinforced nanocomposite hull plating can provide an extra layer of protection that could be the difference between life and death in a combat situation.

tech_ship_armor_2.name: Ceramo-Metal Materials
tech_ship_armor_2.description: A combination of different metals and ceramics that result in a strong armor without sacrificing flexibility.

tech_ship_armor_3.name: Plasteel Materials
tech_ship_armor_3.description: Plasteel is an elastic material that combines many of the qualities of plastics and metal. It is relatively cheap to produce and can be used to augment ship armor.

tech_ship_armor_4.name: Durasteel Materials
tech_ship_armor_4.description: This strong yet flexible material is capable of withstanding severe punishment. It serves well as ship armor.

tech_ship_armor_5.name: Neutronium Materials
tech_ship_armor_5.description: This incredibly dense and strong material can resist firepower that would turn armor made of any other alloys into slag.

grants: Negative Effects from Cosmic Storms on Ship Defenses: -45%
−45% Negative Effects from Cosmic Storms on Ship Defenses

tech_ship_hull_storm_breaker_1.name: Storm Dampening Generators
tech_ship_hull_storm_breaker_1.description: These dampening field generators offer much needed protection to ships traversing cosmic storms.

grants: Negative Effects from Cosmic Storms on Ship Defenses: -90%
−45% Negative Effects from Cosmic Storms on Ship Defenses

tech_ship_hull_storm_breaker_2.name: Storm Breaker Coating
tech_ship_hull_storm_breaker_2.description: This special coating charges the ship's exterior with a storm dampening field, leading to more efficient protection against storms.

grants: Negative Effects from Cosmic Storms on Ship Weapons: -45%

tech_ship_storm_weapons_1.name: Payload Padding
tech_ship_storm_weapons_1.description: A new approach to alloy use in military applications significantly reduces the ability of cosmic storms to interfere with energy weaponry and explosive payloads.

grants: Negative Effects from Cosmic Storms on Ship Weapons: -90%

tech_ship_storm_weapons_2.name: Tempest Cage Architecture
tech_ship_storm_weapons_2.description: This novel approach to ship architecture will significantly reduce the negative effects cosmic storms have on our weapon systems.

tech_slave_colonies.name: Thrall-Worlds
tech_slave_colonies.description: Through the creation of special slave-breeding worlds, we can ensure that we will always have a steady supply of disposable laborers.

tech_society_1.name: Xenobiology
tech_society_1.description: The study of alien life has moved beyond mere cataloging. By examining the structures and survival strategies of organisms evolved under foreign stars, we open new avenues in medicine, adaptation, and design.

tech_society_2.name: Neural Weaving
tech_society_2.description: Through recursive axonal scaffolding and synaptic reticulation, we have developed methods for reorganizing the electrochemical topology of conscious matter. Neurons do not merely transmit - they entwine, organize, and remember. Now, they do so according to our design.

tech_society_3.name: Biostructural Synthesis
tech_society_3.description: Life, in all its staggering variety, is composed of repeating patterns and modular structures. By decoding and replicating these at every scale, we now wield a holistic blueprint of biology. There is little left in nature we do not understand, and less still we cannot recreate.

tech_solar_panel_network.name: Orbital Energy Conversion
tech_solar_panel_network.description: Advances in solar panel technology could offset the operating costs of our starbases. The panels would require an entire starbase module to generate enough energy, however.

tech_space_cloud_weapon_1.name: Cloud Lightning Conduits
tech_space_cloud_weapon_1.description: Void Clouds use the electrical charges generated by the dense gases that make up most of their core to release bolts of burning plasma. Using the same gas composition together with a specialized conduit allows for powerful lightning weaponry.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Construction Ship — Construction Ship\nThe Construction Ship allows for the assembly of various space stations, through the use of advanced welding-drones.
Unlocks Station: Mining Station — Mining Station\nA Mining Station can extract a planet's deposits of Minerals and valuable resources from orbit.
Unlocks Station: Research Station — Research Station\nA Research Station can study various planetary phenomena from orbit, gathering valuable scientific data.

tech_space_construction.name: Offworld Construction
tech_space_construction.description: Construction in space presents our engineers with new design challenges that must be solved before we can build orbital stations above other worlds.

tech_space_defense_station_1.name: Deep Space Defenses
tech_space_defense_station_1.description: This will enable the construction of defensive deep space platforms to protect our Starbases.

tech_space_defense_station_improvement.name: Corps of Engineers
tech_space_defense_station_improvement.description: The creation of a dedicated naval engineering corps will greatly benefit the construction of deep space defense platforms, decreasing building costs and increasing durability.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Science Ship — Science Ship\nThe Science Ship is used as a base of operations for a top Scientist, ready to explore the vastness of space.

tech_space_exploration.name: Space Exploration
tech_space_exploration.description: The realization of faster-than-light travel is a new dawn for space exploration. Manned missions to other star systems are now not only possible, but necessary.

tech_space_mining_1.name: Zero-G Refineries
tech_space_mining_1.description: The addition of internal refineries on mining stations will substantially increase mineral production.

tech_space_mining_2.name: Long-Range Mineral Scanners
tech_space_mining_2.description: Increased scanner range will allow us to more quickly identify mineral concentrations, and focus our mining efforts there.

tech_space_mining_3.name: Mineral Cutting Beams
tech_space_mining_3.description: These powerful short-range lasers can easily slice through rock, making the extraction of minerals a more efficient affair.

tech_space_mining_4.name: Autonomous Mining Drones
tech_space_mining_4.description: Fleets of autonomous drones equipped with mining beams are deployed to quickly and efficiently gather nearby minerals.

tech_space_mining_5.name: Nanite Mineral Probes
tech_space_mining_5.description: These special probes are equipped with swarms of nanites that identify previously unknown mineral concentrations and mark them for later extraction.

tech_space_science_1.name: Zero-G Laboratories
tech_space_science_1.description: A lot of critical research can only be done in a zero gravity environment, which these specialized laboratories are eminently designed for.

tech_space_science_2.name: Miniature Containment Fields
tech_space_science_2.description: Containment force fields are excellent for isolating and holding various substances or specimens so they can be analyzed in detail.

tech_space_science_3.name: Quantum Probes
tech_space_science_3.description: Advanced probes that can thoroughly analyze subjects on a sub-atomic level, generating a wealth of valuable research data.

tech_space_science_4.name: Autonomous Station Protocols
tech_space_science_4.description: Increased automation of station functions will free up more staff for research duties.

tech_space_science_5.name: Multi-Dimensional Analysis
tech_space_science_5.description: Studying something from the limited perspective of a single dimensional reality does not paint the whole picture. Every angle must be considered.

tech_space_trading.name: Offworld Trade Companies
tech_space_trading.description: Trade across interstellar distances presents a new set of challenges to overcome. It is critical to achieve the transfer of goods from one system to another in a timely and above all cost efficient manner.

tech_space_whale_weapon_1.name: Frequency Tuning
tech_space_whale_weapon_1.description: Adapting the Tiyanki method of siphoning energy from gaseous matter, it is possible to construct weapons draining energy from enemy ships.

grants: Unlocks Starbase: Outpost — Outpost\nThe most basic kind of Starbase, Outposts are lightly-armed stations built in stellar orbit to extend national borders. Outposts can not support any Buildings or Modules and are not listed in the Outliner.

tech_starbase_1.name: Starbase Construction
tech_starbase_1.description: A centralized space installation built in close orbit around the system primary is necessary to make full use of the resources in a star system.

grants: Unlocks Starbase Upgrade: Starport — Starport\nUpgrading the Outpost, Starports can house one Building and support two Modules.

tech_starbase_2.name: Starport
tech_starbase_2.description: The earliest starbases were little more than makeshift outposts. Permanent starports will enable us to maintain a firmer grip on star systems.

grants: Unlocks Starbase Upgrade: Starhold — Starhold\nUpgrading the Starport, Starholds can house two Buildings and support four Modules.

tech_starbase_3.name: Starhold
tech_starbase_3.description: As space traffic increases, larger and more defensible starbases are needed to maintain control over system spacelanes.

grants: Unlocks Starbase Upgrade: Star Fortress — Star Fortress\nUpgrading the Starhold, Star Fortresses can house three Buildings and a full complement of six Modules.

tech_starbase_4.name: Star Fortress
tech_starbase_4.description: These mighty space forts will provide a focal point for all military activity in a star system, and their presence is sure to deter all but the most stubborn attackers.

grants: Unlocks Starbase Upgrade: Citadel — Citadel\nUpgrading the Star Fortress, Citadels are the largest and most heavily fortified type of Starbase and can house four Buildings and a full complement of six Modules.

tech_starbase_5.name: Citadel
tech_starbase_5.description: Plans for an immense battlestation capable of holding its own against several strike fleets are now being drawn up. If realized, these citadels will become monuments to greatness as much as system hubs.

tech_starfire_cannon.name: Starfire Cannon
tech_starfire_cannon.description: Like any potential hazard, the dangerous radiation from our star's transformation can also be harnessed as a useful tool. Channeling it as a beam weapon would allow us to overheat and disable enemy ships. \n\nUnlocks a Colony Decision to construct a Starfire Cannon in orbit.

tech_stinger_build_speed.name: Standardized Stinger Incubation
tech_stinger_build_speed.description: These facilities grow sleek, agile biological ships designed for precision and speed. Employing advanced biopods and specialized nutrient solutions, they produce vessels capable of precise and efficient strikes.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Mature Stinger — Mature Stinger\nRefined for greater speed and precision in tactical operations.

tech_stinger_growth_1.name: Improved Stinger Development
tech_stinger_growth_1.description: Refined facilities accelerate growth cycles and improve bio-engineered precision, resulting in vessels with superior maneuverability and accuracy. These enhancements make the Stinger a devastating force in tactical engagements.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Elder Stinger — Elder Stinger\nGrown for ultimate speed, precision, and battlefield dominance.

tech_stinger_growth_2.name: Advanced Stinger Development
tech_stinger_growth_2.description: The apex of bioship growth technology, these advanced facilities produce Stingers of unmatched speed and lethality. Optimized genetic templates and cutting-edge incubation techniques ensure these ships dominate any battlefield with swift and deadly precision.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Juvenile Stinger — Juvenile Stinger\nA swift and deadly bioship, bred for precision strikes and tactical superiority.

tech_stingers.name: Stingers
tech_stingers.description: Stingers are designed to deliver devastating strikes against high-value targets. They excel in exploiting weaknesses in enemy defenses.

tech_storm_manipulation.name: Storm Manipulation
tech_storm_manipulation.description: By harnessing the principles behind storm negation technologies, we can begin to manipulate the astrometeorological nature of the galaxy to serve our own needs.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Cosmic Weather Forecast — Unlocks the ability to see Cosmic Storm Formation Predictions and Cosmic Storm Movement Predictions in the Weather Forecast Map Mode

tech_storm_prediction_1.name: Cosmic Weather Models
tech_storm_prediction_1.description: Through the use of scientific weather models, we can track the movement and formation of impending Cosmic Storms.

grants: Upgrades Feature: Cosmic Weather Forecast — Maximizes the range of Cosmic Storm Formation Predictions and Cosmic Storm Movement Predictions in the Weather Forecast Map Mode

tech_storm_prediction_2.name: Probability Current
tech_storm_prediction_2.description: By applying probability currents to our scientific weather models, our ability to track the movement and formation of impending Cosmic Storms is greatly increased.

tech_strategic_coordination.name: Strategic Coordination Center
tech_strategic_coordination.description: A facility synchronizing the national Starbase network, augmenting defensive and offensive capabilities.

tech_strike_craft_1.name: Carrier Operations
tech_strike_craft_1.description: These manned strike craft are launched from a mothership and rely on their speed and small size to survive long enough to punch through enemy defenses.

tech_strike_craft_2.name: Improved Strike Craft
tech_strike_craft_2.description: The next generation of strike craft, featuring improved avionics, better handling characteristics and more powerful armaments.

tech_strike_craft_3.name: Advanced Strike Craft
tech_strike_craft_3.description: A further refinement in strike craft design, these advanced strike craft are a pilot's dream. Their performance far exceeds that of previous models.

tech_strike_craft_skrand.name: Skravird Strike Craft
tech_strike_craft_skrand.description: Learning from the design expertise of Skrand and his people, these superior strike craft are capable of prolonged engagement and highly adaptive tactics.

tech_subdermal_stimulation.name: Subdermal Stimulation
tech_subdermal_stimulation.description: Deep-tissue implants are the latest innovation in the revolutionary overlapping of sensory engineering and entertainment experiences.

grants: Unlocks Component: Subspace Drive — Jump Drive\nAn insight borne of a desperate desire to leave our home, these Subspace Drive engines were designed to facilitate limited interstellar travel. While only allowing small-scale jumps, they provide a unique opportunity to jumpstart our galactic exploration.

tech_subspace_drive.name: Subspace Drive
tech_subspace_drive.description: An insight borne of a desperate desire to leave our home, these Subspace Drive engines were designed to facilitate limited interstellar travel. While only allowing small-scale jumps, they provide a unique opportunity to jumpstart our galactic exploration.

tech_supreme_alloy.name: Supreme Alloy
tech_supreme_alloy.description: What we thought was the greatest alloy turned out to be far from the truth. Countless pre-FTL refining processes have been cataloged, and we have now synthesized an unbeatable metal.

tech_swarm_strike_craft_1.name: Swarm Spawning Pools
tech_swarm_strike_craft_1.description: Collecting specimens from defeated Prethoryn enables us to clone and genetically program a war-brood of our own.

tech_swarmer_missiles_1.name: Swarmer Missiles
tech_swarmer_missiles_1.description: These smaller missiles are launched in volleys and have been specifically designed to overwhelm enemy point-defense systems.

tech_swarmer_missiles_2.name: Whirlwind Missiles
tech_swarmer_missiles_2.description: New miniaturization techniques will allow us to equip swarmer missiles with more powerful warheads and improved flight performance.

tech_synchronized_defences.name: Synchronized Defenses
tech_synchronized_defences.description: Aligning defensive and offensive weapon execution paradigms allows for increased efficiency.

tech_synth_queen_knowledge.name: Cetana's Thought
tech_synth_queen_knowledge.description: This compendium, a gift from Cetana, is a tapestry of profound insights, elegantly composed and dense with meaning. It offers more than knowledge; it challenges and reshapes our understanding of technology, society, and the fabric of consciousness itself.

tech_synthetic_leaders.name: Artificial Personality Matrix
tech_synthetic_leaders.description: Equipped with a personality, synthetics will finally be able to interact socially on equal terms with the rest of our citizens. Some units may even assume leadership roles.

tech_synthetic_thought_patterns.name: Synthetic Thought Patterns
tech_synthetic_thought_patterns.description: Thinking outside the box merely places you in another, somewhat larger box.

grants: +10% Job Efficiency for Mechanical and Machine Pops

tech_synthetic_workers.name: Artificial Administration
tech_synthetic_workers.description: Highly advanced units that are stronger, faster and more durable than the vast majority of organics. With their upgraded neural processors they are fully capable of independent operations.

tech_telepathy.name: Telepathy
tech_telepathy.description: Once fully adapted to the basics of Psionics, the mind is capable of connecting to other individuals, becoming something greater.

tech_temple_of_transportation.name: Temple of Transportation
tech_temple_of_transportation.description: Transportation networks bring people together: a sentiment shared by many civilization we observed. While we do not have steam engines, our hyper relay networks could serve a similar purpose.

tech_terrestrial_sculpting.name: Terrestrial Sculpting
tech_terrestrial_sculpting.description: There is no simple solution to the problem of macro-scale reshaping of planetary crusts - only bigger trowels and orbitally-deployed drills.

tech_thought_enforcement.name: Thought Enforcement
tech_thought_enforcement.description: Telepaths can monitor the citizenry for incorrect thoughts, but with some study they could also correct thought aberrations that they find.

grants: Unlocks Component: Chemical Thruster — Chemical Thruster\nSimple yet moderately effective chemical thrusters that rely on combustible propellant to generate thrust.

tech_thrusters_1.name: Chemical Thrusters
tech_thrusters_1.description: Simple yet moderately effective chemical thrusters that rely on combustible propellant to function.

grants: Unlocks Component: Ion Thruster — Ion Thruster\nThese electric thrusters use beams of ions to generate thrust without the need for propellant.

tech_thrusters_2.name: Ion Thrusters
tech_thrusters_2.description: These electric thrusters use beams of ions to generate thrust without the need for propellant.

grants: Unlocks Component: Plasma Thruster — Plasma Thruster\nAn advanced form of electric propulsion, plasma thrusters afford ships greater sublight speeds and maneuverability.

tech_thrusters_3.name: Plasma Thrusters
tech_thrusters_3.description: An advanced form of electric propulsion, plasma thrusters afford ships greater sublight speeds and maneuverability.

grants: Unlocks Component: Impulse Thruster — Impulse Thruster\nThese highly advanced fusion-powered thrusters provide ships with unmatched maneuverability and speed under sublight conditions.

tech_thrusters_4.name: Impulse Thrusters
tech_thrusters_4.description: These highly advanced fusion-powered thrusters provide ships with unmatched maneuverability and speed under sublight conditions.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Thrusters upgrades for Space Fauna

tech_thrusters_bio_integration.name: Thruster Bio-integration
tech_thrusters_bio_integration.description: Artificial thrusters can be integrated into spaceborne organisms with appropriate considerations for energy supply and connections to neural motor centers.

tech_titan_hull_1.name: Improved Titan Hulls
tech_titan_hull_1.description: Advances in building techniques will allow for the construction of sturdier and more durable titans.

tech_titan_hull_2.name: Advanced Titan Hulls
