tech_titan_hull_2.description: The latest generation of titan hulls have optimized structural integrity fields and improved bulkheads.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Titan — Titan\nThese massive warships are the pride of the fleet. They are bristling with weapons and typically serve as flagships.
Unlocks Station: Ion Cannon — Ion Cannon\nIon Cannons are massive defense platforms that can be built to orbit a starbase, blasting enemy ships with deadly fire from a long range.

tech_titans.name: Titans
tech_titans.description: Designing ships at this scale allows for a deadly combination of exceptional firepower and cutting-edge auxiliary support. Titan configurations may serve as highly versatile flagships which are also capable of bolstering surrounding vessels or ensnaring hostiles.

tech_tomb_world_adaption.name: Tomb World Adaptation
tech_tomb_world_adaption.description: Through comprehensive study of irradiated environments we will allow our settlers to colonize worlds that have been devastated by nuclear warfare.

tech_torpedoes_1.name: Space Torpedoes
tech_torpedoes_1.description: These torpedoes are essentially very large, slow-moving missiles. They are equipped with more powerful warheads and shield modulators that let them slip unmolested through energy screens.

tech_torpedoes_2.name: Armored Torpedoes
tech_torpedoes_2.description: Upgraded space torpedoes encased in armor, to better withstand enemy point-defense fire. The armor fragments into shards that cause additional damage when the torpedo detonates.

tech_torpedoes_3.name: Devastator Torpedoes
tech_torpedoes_3.description: Advanced torpedoes with very powerful warheads. They have a sleeker design, faster engines and upgraded shield modulators for slipping through energy screens.

tech_toxic_kelp.name: Ocean Ecology Management
tech_toxic_kelp.description: Given enough processing power, networked sensors and distributed stations, even the ocean currents can be managed to a fine level of control.

tech_tracking_implants.name: Tracking Implants
tech_tracking_implants.description: Further advancements in the field of subdermal implants can provide detailed information regarding the movements and actions of the implanted.

tech_transcendent_faith.name: Metacognitive Faith
tech_transcendent_faith.description: Leaving our planetary cradle has opened us up to a new understanding of faith, and its place in a wider context.

tech_trinary_computing.name: Trinary Computing
tech_trinary_computing.description: Different societies have developed alternative solutions for their logistics and computing. These alien ways of thinking have made it easier for us to adapt to foreign empires' structures.

tech_unique_mutation_crystalline_entity.name: Fissile Cores
tech_unique_mutation_crystalline_entity.description: Redundant thought centers allow for a Crystalline Entity to split itself in two as a final gambit to protect its clutch against a particularly dangerous foe.

tech_unique_mutation_cutholoid.name: Gastric Fountain
tech_unique_mutation_cutholoid.description: The powerful digestive system of a Cutholoid can be repurposed to fire kinetic projectiles at extremely high velocity.

tech_unique_mutation_restorative_enzymes.name: Restorative Enzymes
tech_unique_mutation_restorative_enzymes.description: On death, the Tiyanki Matriarch produces an assortment of protective chemicals in a final attempt to preserve the lives of her remaining kin.

tech_unique_mutation_space_amoeba.name: Leechcraft
tech_unique_mutation_space_amoeba.description: Modified Flagella spawn that siphon nutrients and materials from their prey in order to support the regeneration of their host Amoeba.

tech_unique_mutation_starborne_biology.name: Starborne Biology
tech_unique_mutation_starborne_biology.description: A main source of energy for large creatures in deep space comes from the power of starlight. The closer they are to brighter stars, the faster they develop.

tech_unique_mutation_tiyanki.name: Herdsong Chords
tech_unique_mutation_tiyanki.description: The somber song of the Tiyanki inspires its fellow creatures, hardening their resolve in combat.

tech_unique_mutation_voidworm.name: Virulent Cysts
tech_unique_mutation_voidworm.description: Cysts filled with reproductive fluid allow for each Voidworm in a fertile Troika to independently produce spawn when bombarding an inhabited planet.

tech_unity_of_purpose.name: Unity of Purpose
tech_unity_of_purpose.description: The purpose of one is the purpose of all. Together, we are greater than the sum of our parts.

tech_universal_marcophage.name: Universal Macrophage
tech_universal_marcophage.description: These powerful immunology boosters make disease a thing of the past, allowing organic populations to live fuller, healthier lives. May cause serious side effects.

grants: Listening Posts provide +1 Detection Strength and Sensor Range for every 3 Detection Arrays

tech_unusual_senses.name: Unusual Senses
tech_unusual_senses.description: Nothing is more innovative than natural evolution. By studying how pre-FTL societies view their world, we have devised new methods of detecting uninvited ships.

tech_vitality_boosters.name: Vitality Boosters
tech_vitality_boosters.description: Where the body fails, science intervenes.

tech_voidworm_immunity.name: Voidworm Immunity
tech_voidworm_immunity.description: We can develop a cure for Voidworm parasitic infection. All of our colonies would be rendered immune to their current strain of spore bombardment.

tech_volatile_motes.name: Volatile Material Plants
tech_volatile_motes.description: Aside from the obvious safety concerns, the artificial creation of Volatile Motes is an extremely delicate and complicated process that requires highly specialized equipment.

tech_volcanic_forge.name: Volcanic Forge
tech_volcanic_forge.description: When deployed, this facility slowly transforms a planet into a volcanic paradise, surfacing useful resources along the way. Thermoforgers can accelerate the transformation.

grants: Unlocks Feature: Volcanic Terraforming — Allows us to terraform Volcanic Worlds into temperate climates.

tech_volcanic_terraforming.name: Volcanic Terraforming
tech_volcanic_terraforming.description: Advances in material technology and deep-shaft mining techniques allow geo-engineering at previously unthinkable depths and temperatures. We can terraform a Volcanic World into a temperate planet.

grants: Research Option: Volcanic Terraforming — Allows us to terraform Volcanic Worlds into temperate climates.

tech_volcano.name: Deep Crust Engineering
tech_volcano.description: Advances in material technology and deep-shaft mining techniques allow geo-engineering at previously unthinkable depths and temperatures. Magma hotspots can now be exploited, suppressed, or even relocated.

grants: Unlocks Station: Waystations\nUnlocks Contract: Build Waystation — Waystations collect celestial resources and form interstellar trade routes.

tech_waystation_1.name: Waystations
tech_waystation_1.description: Waystations collect celestial resources and form interstellar trade routes.

grants: Unlocks Station Upgrade: Wayport — Allows the construction of upgraded Waystations with expanded storage and improved logistical capacity.

tech_waystation_2.name: Improved Wayline Logistics
tech_waystation_2.description: Our Waystations are no longer simple markers along the stars. Improved logistics allow them to store greater reserves and transfer resources more efficiently along established Waylines.

grants: Unlocks Station Upgrade: Wayhold — Allows the construction of fully developed Waystations that strengthen the Wayline network and maximize logistical efficiency.

tech_waystation_3.name: Advanced Wayline Logistics
tech_waystation_3.description: Advanced coordination protocols bind distant Waystations into a cohesive network. Resources, signals, and supplies move across the Waylines with unmatched precision.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_1.name: Vector Lock Cannon
tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_1.description: Biologically enhanced projectiles are fired, countering evasive maneuvers and striking agile targets.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_2.name: Enzymatic Webcaster
tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_2.description: Fires refined projectiles with superior tracking enzymes and adaptive flight paths, increasing hit rates against fast-moving targets.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_3.name: Seeker Shard Array
tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_3.description: Deploys self-guided bio-munitions that lock onto movement patterns, ensuring accuracy against elusive enemies.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_4.name: Pinion Accelerator
tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_4.description: Utilizes complex organic targeting systems that anticipate evasive actions, making even the most agile prey vulnerable.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_5.name: Prey Tracker
tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_5.description: Fires intelligent bio-projectiles equipped with predictive tracking, overcoming the most sophisticated evasion protocols.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_6.name: Precision Lancer
tech_weaver_bio_anti_evasion_6.description: Deploys bio-plasma rounds that adapt mid-flight, guaranteeing hits against even the most erratic maneuvers.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_1.name: Reload Jammer
tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_1.description: Launches organic projectiles that release specialized enzymes, interfering with enemy weapon reloading systems and reducing their rate of fire.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_2.name: Fire Disrupter
tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_2.description: Enhances disruption enzymes to interfere more effectively with reloading cycles, significantly delaying enemy volleys.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_3.name: Mind Missiles
tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_3.description: Deploys intelligent bio-projectiles that target critical reloading systems, creating cascading delays across enemy fleets.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_4.name: Degradation Beams
tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_4.description: Utilizes adaptive biological compounds that degrade reloading mechanisms, halving the firing efficiency of even the most advanced weaponry.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_5.name: Fiend Disabler
tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_5.description: Fires advanced munitions that emit suppression fields, crippling enemy reloading systems and rendering them painfully slow.

tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_6.name: Tracker Stopper
tech_weaver_bio_anti_fire_rate_6.description: Releases a biological pulse that locks down enemy reloading for extended periods.

tech_weaver_bio_confuser_1.name: Gloom Spores
tech_weaver_bio_confuser_1.description: Organic projectiles imbued with destabilizing enzymes scramble enemy targeting systems and reduce their accuracy.

tech_weaver_bio_confuser_2.name: Tangle Pulse
tech_weaver_bio_confuser_2.description: Refined biological compounds disrupt targeting systems and short-range communications, sowing chaos among enemy ranks.

tech_weaver_bio_confuser_3.name: Neuro Scourge
tech_weaver_bio_confuser_3.description: Adaptive bio-munitions are deployed to exploit neural weaknesses in both organic and synthetic crews, crippling enemy efficiency.

tech_weaver_bio_confuser_4.name: Ruin Barbs
tech_weaver_bio_confuser_4.description: Intelligent bio-projectiles emit disruptive fields on impact, scrambling enemy targeting systems and causing widespread malfunctions.

tech_weaver_bio_confuser_5.name: Snare Darts
tech_weaver_bio_confuser_5.description: Advanced biological ordnance creates a cascading feedback loop within enemy systems, rendering their attacks wildly ineffective.

tech_weaver_bio_confuser_6.name: Havoc Storm
tech_weaver_bio_confuser_6.description: Bio-electromagnetic pulses incapacitate targeting systems and leave fleets in a state of disarray.

tech_weaver_bio_evasion_1.name: Energy Burster
tech_weaver_bio_evasion_1.description: Fires bio-projectiles that emit bursts of energy upon impact, subtly enhancing the maneuverability of our vessels.

tech_weaver_bio_evasion_2.name: Tangler Pod Launcher
tech_weaver_bio_evasion_2.description: Releases concentrated bio-energetic fields, further boosting the evasion capabilities of our ships.

tech_weaver_bio_evasion_3.name: Agile Spike Array
tech_weaver_bio_evasion_3.description: Launches intelligent bio-projectiles that adaptively enhance agility, ensuring superior evasion even in the most chaotic battles.

tech_weaver_bio_evasion_4.name: Electro Sprayer
tech_weaver_bio_evasion_4.description: Deploys advanced munitions that generate dynamic bio-electric auras, significantly improving the ability of ships to evade enemy fire.

tech_weaver_bio_evasion_5.name: Evasion Darts
tech_weaver_bio_evasion_5.description: Fires highly advanced projectiles that create large-scale enhancement fields, granting unparalleled evasion to fleets.

tech_weaver_bio_evasion_6.name: Adaptive Tendrils
tech_weaver_bio_evasion_6.description: Fires bio-munitions that emit fields of adaptive energy, allowing fleets to dance effortlessly out of harm's way.

tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_1.name: Weaver Biofield Generators
tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_1.description: Fires organic projectiles that emit energizing biofields, subtly increasing the firing speed of weapons systems.

tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_2.name: Weaver Booster Blaster
tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_2.description: Refined bio-munitions enhance biofield intensity, further accelerating the rate of fire.

tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_3.name: Weaver Organo-Tech Amplifier
tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_3.description: Deploys adaptive bio-projectiles that amplify reaction times and system efficiency, enabling a significant increase in fire rate.

tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_4.name: Weaver Aura Caster
tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_4.description: Generates dynamic bio-electric auras, vastly enhancing firing speed across multiple vessels, ensuring relentless pressure on enemy fleets.

tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_5.name: Weaver Swift Shooter
tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_5.description: Unleashes hyper-charged bio-munitions that create large-scale enhancement fields, enabling fleets to unleash sustained, rapid-fire barrages.

tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_6.name: Weaver Wave Maker
tech_weaver_bio_fire_rate_6.description: Projects waves of bio-energy that push our weaponry to their peak performance, flooding the battlefield with devastating firepower.

tech_weaver_bio_healing_1.name: Spore Launcher
tech_weaver_bio_healing_1.description: Regenerative pods are launched to deliver strong healing compounds to allied ships.

tech_weaver_bio_healing_2.name: Improved Spore Launcher
tech_weaver_bio_healing_2.description: Highly efficient pods imbued with healing biomatter are deployed to rapidly repair damage across multiple vessels.

tech_weaver_bio_healing_3.name: Advanced Spore Launcher
tech_weaver_bio_healing_3.description: Pods containing repair agents are launched, optimizing healing based on the severity of damage and ensuring no vulnerabilities remain.

tech_weaver_bio_healing_4.name: Adaptive Spore Launcher
tech_weaver_bio_healing_4.description: Pods that saturate the battlefield with adaptive spores provide smart healing to all allied vessels within range.

tech_weaver_bio_healing_5.name: Intelligent Adaptive Spore Launcher
tech_weaver_bio_healing_5.description: Deploys pods that unleash a wave of intelligent microorganisms, capable of revitalizing even the most damaged fleets.

tech_weaver_bio_healing_6.name: Rebirth Spores
tech_weaver_bio_healing_6.description: Pods filled with malleable cells are launched to trigger the growth of new hull tissues, pushing the endurance of organic vessels beyond their former limits.

tech_weaver_build_speed.name: Standardized Weaver Incubation
tech_weaver_build_speed.description: These facilities nurture mid-sized biological ships within refined biopods, employing enhanced nutrient delivery and genetic optimization to produce agile and adaptable vessels for the fleet.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Mature Weaver — Mature Weaver\nA Mature Weaver has been selectively grown to enhance mobility and adaptability in fleet operations.

tech_weaver_growth_1.name: Improved Weaver Development
tech_weaver_growth_1.description: These facilities employ enhanced bio-engineering techniques to accelerate growth cycles and enhance vessel adaptability. Improved genetic matrices and optimized environments ensure these biological ships are both durable and highly responsive in combat.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Elder Weaver — Elder Weaver\nAn Elder Weaver has been meticulously grown for superior agility and tactical versatility.

tech_weaver_growth_2.name: Advanced Weaver Development
tech_weaver_growth_2.description: These facilities produce biological ships of unparalleled precision and versatility. Revolutionary growth techniques and adaptive genetic enhancements result in vessels that thrive in even the most demanding tactical scenarios.

grants: Unlocks Ship Type: Juvenile Weaver — Juvenile Weaver\nThe Weaver is a versatile mid-sized bioship, designed to outmaneuver larger foes and support fleet engagements.

tech_weavers.name: Weavers
tech_weavers.description: Building on the foundations of early bio-engineering, Weavers are crafted to balance agility with increased combat capabilities.

tech_wilderness_cluster.name: Clustered Synapses
tech_wilderness_cluster.description: We can accelerate the fluency of global, collective thought by investing it in gatherings of symbionts whose sole purpose in life is to facilitate that same will.

tech_wilderness_confluence.name: Confluence of Thought
tech_wilderness_confluence.description: Our mutualistic will shall be strengthened by vast gatherings of deeply empathic symbionts, so in-tune with their surroundings as to concentrate and re-broadcast our collective thought.

tech_wilderness_node.name: Centers of Being
tech_wilderness_node.description: By encouraging the growth of deep-thinking symbionts in glades throughout our distributed self, our collective will shall be felt more keenly by all.

tech_wilderness_terraform.name: Planetary Germination
tech_wilderness_terraform.description: To spread our roots to a new world first requires us to prepare the seedbed. By first terraforming a planet we can ensure that our colonies are off to a healthy start.

tech_wormhole_stabilization.name: Wormhole Stabilization
tech_wormhole_stabilization.description: A naturally occurring subspace wormhole is a fickle thing, and its fluctuating energy levels typically make it impossible to travel safely between its linked apertures. There are ways to temporarily stabilize its matrix, however.

tech_xeno_aesthetics.name: Xeno-Aesthetics
tech_xeno_aesthetics.description: After analyzing a multitude of artists from drastically different cultures, we have come up with a general theorem. By studying a civilization's art and culture, we can gain an advantage against them in combat.

tech_xeno_diplomacy.name: Xeno Diplomacy
tech_xeno_diplomacy.description: Advancing our understanding of interactions with - and manipulations of - the xeno is a necessary step in forming more permanent interstellar alliances.

grants: Grants a small amount of  Influence\nAllows Renowned Leaders to appear.

tech_xeno_linguistics.name: Xeno-Linguistics
tech_xeno_linguistics.description: Given recent encounters with intelligent races, it is essential that we improve our xeno-linguistic capabilities.

tech_xeno_relations.name: Xeno Relations
tech_xeno_relations.description: The complexities of interstellar diplomacy necessitate the forming of bonds with foreign powers in order to further one's goals.

tech_xeno_tourism_agency.name: Xeno Outreach Agencies
tech_xeno_tourism_agency.description: This corporate agency promotes a wide variety of interstellar tourist attractions, as well as offering employment packages and signing bonuses to potential emigrants interested in relocating to corporate space.

grants: Unlocks Component: Zero Point Reactor — Zero Point Reactor\nThese generators extract vacuum energy, providing an almost limitless supply of ship power. There is no more efficient way to generate energy.

tech_zero_point_power.name: Zero Point Power
tech_zero_point_power.description: These generators extract vacuum energy, providing an almost limitless supply of ship power. There is no more efficient way to generate energy.

tech_zro_launcher.name: Zro Launchers
tech_zro_launcher.description: These highly concentrated pellets of zro can be dispersed through enemy shields unabated, shifting through multiple realities. Once contact is made with a physical object, the effects are exponential in devastation.
